src: If it does, then the product, in conjunction with a page printer that is compatible with it, will be almost infinitely more powerful than one that does not.
mt: Se lo fa, allora il prodotto, in combinazione con una stampante di pagine compatibile con esso, sarà quasi infinitamente più potente di una che non lo è.

src: HUDDERSFIELD have an electronic scoreboard at Leeds Road — and it could register an exceptionally high score when the Aussies play us next month!
mt: HUDDERSFIELD tiene un marcador electrónico en Leeds Road, ¡y podría registrar una puntuación excepcionalmente alta cuando los australianos jueguen contra nosotros el mes que viene!

src: In particular, he began to repeatedly stress the conservative themes that would provide the centrepiece of his campaigns for the governorship of California and which he would eventually carry with him into the White House.
mt: En particular, empezó a insistir repetidamente en los temas conservadores que proporcionarían la pieza central de sus campañas para el cargo de gobernador de California y que finalmente llevaría consigo a la Casa Blanca.

src: We have negotiated a tough agreement — it's not a question of charity!
mt: Abbiamo negoziato un accordo duro, non è una questione di beneficenza!

src: Three men attacked Joe — and we have been trying really hard to figure out a motive.
mt: Tres hombres atacaron a Joe, y hemos intentado averiguar el motivo.

src: Extra effects provide various industrial and ambient noises, along with unconventional sounds which work well in contemporary rhythmic contexts.
mt: Gli effetti extra offrono vari rumori industriali e ambientali, oltre a suoni non convenzionali che funzionano bene in contesti ritmici contemporanei.

src: Well, the feeling here in Hereford this afternoon is that maybe the National Heritage Memorial Fund may have acted prematurely with their offer.
mt: Bueno, la sensación aquí en Hereford esta tarde es que tal vez el Fondo Nacional de Monumentos y Sitios Históricos haya actuado prematuramente con su oferta.

src: ‘While we would hope the money we are spending at the moment is proving to be cost-effective, at the end of the day electronic security is really only providing a temporary delay,’ said Mr Banks.
mt: “Aunque esperamos que el dinero que estamos invirtiendo en este momento resulte rentable, al final del día, la seguridad electrónica solo está proporcionando un retraso temporal”, dijo el Sr. Banks.

src: ROMANTIC comedy about an egotistical TV weatherman who gets caught in a time-warp and decides to live it up and indulge his secret fantasies.
mt: Una comedia romántica sobre un meteorólogo televisivo egoísta que se queda atrapado en una máquina del tiempo y decide vivirlo todo y complacer sus fantasías secretas.

src: Mrs Wedderburn had been the piano accompanist, a reed of a woman who wore wire - framed spectacles and reputedly was a heavy drinker.
mt: La Sra. Wedderburn había sido la acompañante de piano, una mujer delgada que usaba gafas de montura de alambre y que, según la reputación, era una gran bebedora.

src: The great ragbag of reforms now being discussed in private will probably be displayed on January 17th, when the Commons is to debate a report on modernising its finances and management.
mt: La gran bolsa de reformas que ahora se está discutiendo en privado probablemente se mostrará el 17 de enero, cuando la Cámara de los Comunes debata un informe sobre la modernización de sus finanzas y su gestión.

src: But when I asked her if she knew of anyone who might have a motive for killing Alain, it didn't seem to spark any recognition.
mt: Pero cuando le pregunté si sabía de alguien que pudiera tener un motivo para matar a Alain, no pareció que le recordara nada.

src: He was going to have to take action, one way or the other.
mt: Tendría que tomar medidas, de una forma u otra.

src: Although there was little originality in Paley's argument and little new in his approach to natural history, his emphasis on the usefulness of organic structures had a strong impact on the minds of a social elite whose wealth was increasingly based on trade and commerce.
mt: Sebbene l'argomento di Paley fosse poco originale e il suo approccio alla storia naturale poco innovativo, la sua enfasi sull'utilità delle strutture organiche ebbe un forte impatto sulle menti di un'élite sociale la cui ricchezza si basava sempre più sul commercio.

src: She could make a huge fuss, but half an hour later would be the life of a dinner party, for she was very vain and never missed a chance to show herself off.
mt: Ella podía hacer un gran alboroto, pero media hora más tarde sería la vida de una cena de fiesta, porque era muy vanidosa y nunca perdió la oportunidad de exhibirse.

src: Forgot who will face the consequences, I dare say!
mt: Ho dimenticato chi dovrà affrontare le conseguenze, oso dire!

src: Unfortunately, however, plastic recycling is little practised in this country although Tesco has initiated a limited scheme.
mt: Sfortunatamente, tuttavia, il riciclaggio della plastica è poco praticato in questo paese, sebbene Tesco abbia avviato un programma limitato.

src: I realized how old I was as his seemed to diminish: I was old enough to be his mother.
mt: Me di cuenta de mi edad cuando la suya parecía disminuir: tenía la edad suficiente para ser su madre.

src: I will spring a tear, stand at attention and salute that old Scottish soldier who took an alien handed to feed his family and still bring honour to the 91st of Foot.
mt: Voy a llorar, estar de pie y saludar a ese viejo soldado escocés que tomó un alienígena que le dieron de comer a su familia y aún trae honor al 91.er de Infantería.

src: GREEDY garages in Britain are taking advantage of the new legislation on seat belts in cars by exploiting anxious parents.
mt: Los talleres de reparación de automóviles más codiciosos de Gran Bretaña están aprovechándose de la nueva legislación sobre cinturones de seguridad en los automóviles para explotar a los padres ansiosos.

src: The locals thought she was a stuck-up bitch from Belfast, which she embodied wholeheartedly, and the other guests — foreigners, mostly Dutch and Germans by their collar sizes — were taken by her vivacity, and the calm indulgence of the quiet, handsome man opposite her, who said little, smiled a lot, and ordered a second full fried breakfast in a way that had the waitress fit to melt into his arms.
mt: Los lugareños pensaban que era una zorra engreída de Belfast, algo que ella encarnaba con todo su corazón, y los otros huéspedes, extranjeros, en su mayoría holandeses y alemanes por el tamaño de sus cuellos, se quedaron pasmados por su vivacidad y la tranquila indulgencia del hombre apacible y apuesto que estaba frente a ella, que hablaba poco, sonreía mucho y pidió un segundo desayuno completo frito de una forma que hizo que la camarera se derritiera en sus brazos.

src: Younger players in particular were looked after, since not being familiar with how things are done on a tour has blighted more than one career.
mt: Los jugadores más jóvenes, en particular, fueron atendidos, ya que no estar familiarizado con la forma en que se hacen las cosas en un tour ha arruinado más de una carrera.

src: Presently he felt bound to dampen their enthusiasm for all this optimism.
mt: En ese momento, él se sintió obligado a frenar su entusiasmo por todo este optimismo.

src: Irresistible charm is brought to bear again as she flatters a worthy old bag ( ‘ unpleasant ’ ) who has a few tedious objections to our Hildamay waltzing off with her granddaughter.
mt: El irresistible encanto se pone de manifiesto de nuevo cuando ella halaga a una vieja bolsa digna (” desagradable “) que tiene unas pocas tediosas objeciones a que nuestra Hildamay se vaya con su nieta.

src: ‘This is turning into one of those mediaeval disputes which argue over trivialities endlessly,’ he said.
mt: “Esto se está convirtiendo en una de esas disputas medievales que se prolongan interminablemente por cuestiones triviales”, dijo.

src: Mention the name Paul Reed Smith and most people become reluctant to spend money.
mt: Cuando se menciona el nombre de Paul Reed Smith, la mayoría de las personas se muestran reticentes a gastar dinero.

src: Grace has been your driving force for years.
mt: Grace ha sido tu fuerza impulsora durante años.

src: Generally, always use a rear foot kick after a feint.
mt: In genere, dopo una finta, si deve sempre usare un calcio con il piede posteriore.

src: They are impressive up front, as they showed against England at Waterloo, and have some fleet-footed customers behind who are able to outplay virtually any opposition.
mt: Son impresionantes en ataque, como ya demostraron contra Inglaterra en Waterloo, y tienen unos jugadores rápidos en defensa que son capaces de superar a cualquier rival.

src: The individual responsible for this unacceptable behaviour shall remain nameless to protect his listening and viewing ratings, suffice it to say that his name suggests that he is capable of having a significant impact.
mt: L'individuo responsabile di questo comportamento inaccettabile rimarrà anonimo per proteggere i suoi ascolti e le sue visualizzazioni, basti dire che il suo nome suggerisce che è in grado di avere un impatto significativo.

src: As they circled over Durham Cathedral, love-struck Niall asked her to marry him, to Carol, who was celebrating her 38th birthday.
mt: Mientras daban vueltas sobre la Catedral de Durham, el enamorado Niall le pidió matrimonio a Carol, que celebraba su 38.º cumpleaños.

src: Addressing a Lions Club conference in 1990, John Patten declared that ‘ Active citizenship has already inspired many people …
mt: Di fronte a una conferenza del Lions Club nel 1990, John Patten dichiarò che “la cittadinanza attiva ha già ispirato molte persone...

src: When I'm working in the theatre, I tend to avoid TV dramas, though I have a soft spot for P D James and Ruth Rendell thrillers.
mt: Cuando trabajo en el teatro, suelo evitar las series de televisión, aunque tengo un punto débil por los thrillers de P. D. James y Ruth Rendell.

src: As well as remaining vigilant for surface coins and jewellery, beachcombers also look for non-metal items on their foreshore hunting grounds.
mt: Oltre a rimanere vigili per le monete e i gioielli sulla superficie, i cacciatori di tesori cercano anche oggetti non metallici nei loro terreni di caccia sulla battigia.

src: Obviously, if we're going to be two big unions, obviously Portsmouth is no longer going to meet our needs and I think that's a shame because several congresses I've been to and this is the finest weather I've ever enjoyed.
mt: Obviamente, si vamos a ser dos grandes sindicatos, obviamente Portsmouth ya no va a satisfacer nuestras necesidades y creo que es una pena porque en varios congresos a los que he ido y este es el mejor clima que jamás haya disfrutado.

src: He acted the fool, losing at first to pique their curiosity, but in an hour emptied his three victims' purses.
mt: Él hacía el tonto, perdiendo al principio para despertar su curiosidad, pero en una hora vació las carteras de sus tres víctimas.

src: Making no secret of methods or means, David is a proud user of mechanical aids, ranging from lathes to the Woodcarver, from drum sanders to a Black & Decker Powerfile.
mt: Non facendo mistero di metodi o mezzi, David è un fiero utilizzatore di ausili meccanici, che vanno dai torni al Woodcarver, dalle levigatrici a tamburo a una Powerfile Black & Decker.

src: ‘ People were literally trying to escape with their lives but I was rooted to the spot. ’
mt: “La gente literalmente intentaba escapar con sus vidas, pero yo estaba clavado en el lugar”.

src: The highlight of the celebrations is the Centenary Trophy in June when the World champions, Olympic champions and England join Ireland, but the youths get things started in a series switched to Ireland from its usual four-year cycle to suit the occasion.
mt: El punto culminante de las celebraciones es el Centenary Trophy en junio, cuando los campeones del mundo, los campeones olímpicos y los ingleses se unen a Irlanda, pero los jóvenes dan inicio a las cosas en una serie que se desplazó a Irlanda desde su ciclo habitual de cuatro años para adaptarse a la ocasión.

src: His illustrations have remained timeless and forever continue to fascinate and inspire children of all ages.
mt: Sus ilustraciones han permanecido intemporales y siguen fascinando e inspirando a niños de todas las edades.

src: ‘We leave winter behind us, it seems,’ Tagan said, turning on his horse to look back at the still-white hills.
mt: “Parece que dejamos el invierno atrás”, dijo Tagan, volviendo su caballo para mirar hacia atrás, a las colinas aún blancas.

src: They tried to make Daniel a ward of court — but Mrs Stoneman refused to back down.
mt: Intentaron convertir a Daniel en un pupilo del tribunal, pero la Sra. Stoneman se negó a dar marcha atrás.

src: And if we're offering you your passage home, you and the children, and help in adjusting to your new life once you get there, and a good convent school for the girls, so that they can go straight on with the nuns and will not really notice any difference, well, all that's to be regarded as a loan, which we're very glad to offer you for an extended period, in the hopes of getting you back among caring people.
mt: Y si te ofrecemos el pasaje a casa, a ti y a los niños, y ayuda para que te adaptes a tu nueva vida una vez que llegues allí, y una buena escuela del convento para las niñas, para que puedan seguir con las monjas y no noten realmente ninguna diferencia, bueno, todo eso debe considerarse como un préstamo, que estamos muy contentos de ofrecerte por un período prolongado, con la esperanza de que vuelvas a estar entre personas que cuidan.

src: Colin Jackson hopes to defeat his best friend, Olympic champion Mark McKoy, in their first meeting since the Canadian controversially won the world indoor sprint hurdles title after seemingly getting a flyer.
mt: Colin Jackson espera derrotar a su mejor amigo, el campeón olímpico Mark McKoy, en su primer encuentro desde que el canadiense ganara de forma controvertida el título mundial de carrera con vallas en pista cubierta después de que aparentemente le dieran un pase.

src: Another one fails: Zeos International Ltd reports that a US district court dismissed a class action shareholder suit against it because the plaintiffs failed to provide specific facts that were material to the trial: the suit was filed last September, alleging that the company failed to disclose the formation of its new subsidiary, Occidental Corp, to manufacture and market lower cost computers under a new brand name, a development revealed by the Wall Street Journal.
mt: Otro fracasa: Zeos International Ltd informa que un tribunal de distrito de EE. UU. desestimó una demanda colectiva de accionistas contra la empresa porque los demandantes no presentaron hechos específicos que fueran relevantes para el juicio: la demanda se presentó en septiembre pasado, alegando que la empresa no había revelado la formación de su nueva subsidiaria, Occidental Corp, para fabricar y comercializar computadoras de bajo costo bajo una nueva marca, un desarrollo revelado por el Wall Street Journal.

src: Before I left school, the local papers were full of me, They were always saying things like ‘This boy will reach the top’ and that, and I suppose you could say I took notice of the media.
mt: Antes de que me fuera de la escuela, los periódicos locales estaban llenos de mí, siempre decían cosas como: “Este chico llegará a la cima” y eso, y supongo que podría decir que me di cuenta de los medios.

src: 'Facials' meaning films of people making faces, grimaces, caricatures, human caricatures really.
mt: "Facials" significa películas de personas haciendo caras, muecas, caricaturas, caricaturas humanas, en realidad.

src: More than one was executed as a consequence of making what were alleged to be seditious or treacherous statements in the House of Commons.
mt: Più di uno fu giustiziato per aver fatto dichiarazioni sediziose o traditrici nella Camera dei Comuni.

src: Even I can think of some lines that would be too offensive for his liking.
mt: Incluso yo puedo pensar en algunas líneas que serían demasiado ofensivas para él.

src: It reached a crisis point when the couple were having a night out in Ross on Wye, where they lived.
mt: Llegó a un punto de crisis cuando la pareja estaba de fiesta en Ross on Wye, donde vivían.

src: He began to note down suitable thoughts and epigrams on pieces of office copy-paper, not really with the intention of memorizing them, but with the idea that he might put them in his jacket pocket and touch them from time to time during the programme to give himself reassurance, knowing that if the worst really came to the worst he could take them out and refresh his memory.
mt: Comenzó a anotar pensamientos y epígrafes adecuados en trozos de papel de copia de oficina, no realmente con la intención de memorizarlos, sino con la idea de que podría ponerlos en el bolsillo de su chaqueta y tocarlos de vez en cuando durante el programa para tranquilizarse a sí mismo, sabiendo que si realmente llegaba a lo peor, podría sacarlos y refrescar su memoria.

src: Your carefree and uninhibited ways were all very well when you were a little girl — though Daddy did spank you, if you remember, for letting the sweep try on his medals, and you got some terrible bruises that time you rescued the kitten from those rough boys.
mt: Tu forma despreocupada y desinhibidora estaba muy bien cuando eras una niña pequeña, aunque papá te dio una palmada, si lo recuerdas, por dejar que el barrendero probara sus medallas, y tuviste unos moretones terribles cuando rescataste al gatito de esos chicos rudos.

src: This has made the situation even more upsetting, given that the privatisation was carried out against the wishes of the public.
mt: Questo ha reso la situazione ancora più preoccupante, dato che la privatizzazione è stata effettuata contro la volontà del pubblico.

src: Doctors and nurses among the mourners rushed to resuscitate the driver, funeral director Leslie Adams.
mt: Los doctores y enfermeras que estaban entre los deudos se apresuraron a reanimar al conductor, el director de funerales Leslie Adams.

src: Whatever one's view of the literary merits of the Manual (and humour is ultimately a matter of personal taste), it is certainly wrong of Mr. Browning to imply that the book is inept, contains irritating mistakes and exhibits poor production values: this is simply not the case.
mt: Cualquiera que sea el punto de vista sobre los méritos literarios del Manual (y el humor es, en última instancia, una cuestión de gustos personales), es sin duda un error del Sr. Browning sugerir que el libro es inepto, que contiene errores irritantes y que presenta valores de producción deficientes: simplemente no es así.

src: Earlier, he had been amazed by the amount of sludge being discharged by his pores, so before going back to the hot-rooms, he went to the wash handbasin and scrubbed his face very thoroughly, and imagined all his blackheads disappearing down the drain along with the waste water.
mt: Antes, él había quedado asombrado por la cantidad de lodo que salía de sus poros, así que, antes de volver a las habitaciones calientes, fue al lavabo y se frotó la cara muy bien, e imaginó que todos sus puntos negros desaparecían por el desagüe junto con las aguas residuales.

src: Samsung Electronics Co Ltd has abandoned its Unix fax unit Samsung Software America and dissolved the operation after about a year.
mt: Samsung Electronics Co Ltd ha abbandonato la sua unità fax Unix Samsung Software America e ha sciolto l'operazione dopo circa un anno.

src: Well, you're either sort of scraping off the ceiling because you're extremely elated.
mt: Bueno, o estás rascando el techo porque estás muy eufórico.

src: Katharine Hepburn reveals secrets about Hollywood in Me ( Viking, £16.99 ), and talks engagingly about her 30-year affair with Spencer Tracy : ‘ I thought you were a rumour, ’ said his wife to her on his death.
mt: Katharine Hepburn revela secretos sobre Hollywood en Me (Viking, £16.99), y habla de forma atractiva sobre su relación de 30 años con Spencer Tracy: “Pensé que eras un rumor”, le dijo su esposa a ella cuando él murió.

src: ‘ It is important for us to go on remaining composed and keeping calm, as we will, ’ he added.
mt: "È importante per noi continuare a rimanere composti e mantenere la calma, come faremo", ha aggiunto.

src: He's got a teacher bossing him around who's about four years older than he is, if that, and a lot less self-confident, but has all the advantages.
mt: Tiene un profesor que le manda órdenes y que es unos cuatro años mayor que él, si es que lo es, y mucho menos seguro de sí mismo, pero tiene todas las ventajas.

src: They did not seem to mind me staying, but it was getting a bit like the ocean liner scene in the Marx brothers' Night at the Opera.
mt: No parecía importarle que me quedara, pero se estaba poniendo un poco como la escena del transatlántico en la película «Una noche en la ópera» de los hermanos Marx.

src: We think it desirable that the same type of teacher should be employed in these courses ( One-Year, Terminal and less formal ) as in University Tutorial Classes and that arrangements should be made whereby staff-tutors appointed for extra-mural work by the Universities should be encouraged to devote part of their time to less formal work, not only in the interests of the work, but also in order to provide a variety of occupation for the tutor and to ensure that he remains informed about all phases of the adult education movement.
mt: Riteniamo auspicabile che per questi corsi (di un anno, terminali e meno formali) venga impiegato lo stesso tipo di insegnante che per le lezioni universitarie e che vengano prese disposizioni per incoraggiare gli insegnanti nominati per il lavoro extra-murale dalle università a dedicare parte del loro tempo a un lavoro meno formale, non solo nell'interesse del lavoro, ma anche per fornire una varietà di occupazione all'insegnante e per assicurarsi che rimanga informato su tutte le fasi del movimento per l'educazione degli adulti.

src: Their kindness is truly exceptional and I do hope they win your Gold Star award.
mt: Su amabilidad es realmente excepcional y espero que ganen su premio Estrella de Oro.

src: Learn to accept and cope with minor health problems and take time to learn how to manage them.
mt: Impara ad accettare e a far fronte a problemi di salute minori e prenditi il tempo per imparare a gestirli.

src: I've encountered a problem over this before, bemoaning the appalling performance of a 386/40 until I noticed that the tiny turbo light was off and, instead of running at 40MHz, the machine was running at 8MHz!
mt: Ya he tenido este problema antes, lamentándome por el pésimo rendimiento de un 386/40 hasta que me di cuenta de que la pequeña luz del turbo estaba apagada y, en vez de funcionar a 40MHz, la máquina funcionaba a 8MHz.

src: Runners cause chaos.
mt: Los corredores causan el caos.

src: Now that we have an escaped political prisoner on the loose, everybody is hesitant to have anything to do with people like you.
mt: Ahora que tenemos a un prisionero político fugado suelto, todo el mundo duda en tener algo que ver con gente como tú.

src: Government fixes the format in which BR has to work ; and if, as the Hidden report attests, many of its problems today reflect lack of past planning, lack of farsighted investment, struggling financially, then that is not just BR's doing.
mt: Il governo stabilisce il formato in cui la BR deve lavorare; e se, come attesta il rapporto Hidden, molti dei suoi problemi oggi rispecchiano la mancanza di pianificazione nel passato, la mancanza di investimenti lungimiranti, la lotta finanziaria, allora non è solo colpa della BR.

src: Be careful what you say, Cardiff.
mt: Ten cuidado con lo que dices, Cardiff.

src: It's just a difficult day.
mt: Es solo un día difícil.

src: They are hoping the authorities will ignore the situation.
mt: Esperan que las autoridades ignoren la situación.

src: After tea we would sometimes walk round their garden, and she gave me tips on gardening which have since been very useful to me ; and cuttings, which still bring her to my mind.
mt: Después del té, a veces dábamos una vuelta por su jardín, y ella me daba consejos sobre jardinería que desde entonces me han sido muy útiles; y esquejes, que aún me recuerdan a ella.

src: Ole Bert Moseley's here exactly at nine o'clock every Monday mornin' wiv me stuff, an' Albert Buller comes round every Thursday mornin' ter take me order.
mt: Ole Bert Moseley viene aquí exactamente a las nueve de la mañana todos los lunes con mis cosas, y Albert Buller viene todos los jueves por la mañana para tomar mi pedido.

src: They were under no illusions that they could do a better job from Detroit, but they had become increasingly concerned that they were getting out of touch with what was happening around the world, and that the smaller issue was dominating the larger one.
mt: No se hacían ilusiones de que podrían hacer un mejor trabajo desde Detroit, pero les preocupaba cada vez más que se estaban desconectando de lo que sucedía en el mundo y que el problema menor estaba dominando al mayor.

src: Oh they, they say it's all controllable so that I have, I have answered, I have not just let the Environmental Health wash over me I have actually written back to them again, er I will be interested to see whether I get a letter back from them, but I phoned up the Council this morning and they're rejecting on two grounds, one is to do with the highway and the sort of the traffic situation coming in there, although the, the authority, the Highway Department are not objecting to it and the other one is erm, on local environmental issues I think you know that is, is unsuitably, unsuitable environmentally to the area well I can only say that I'm grateful to the planning, to the planning offices for they're taking a risk because I think they're on thin ice erm and so long as the committee will, will back them up I mean I do not know of what else I could of done as a person.
mt: Oh, dicen que todo es controlable, así que he contestado, no me he dejado llevar por la salud ambiental, de hecho, les he vuelto a escribir, me interesaría saber si me responden, pero llamé al Ayuntamiento esta mañana y están rechazando por dos motivos, uno tiene que ver con la carretera y la situación del tráfico que llega allí, aunque la autoridad, el Departamento de Carreteras no se opone a ello y el otro es, en cuestiones ambientales locales, creo que saben que es, es inadecuado, ambientalmente inadecuado para la zona, bueno, solo puedo decir que estoy agradecido a la planificación, a las oficinas de planificación porque están asumiendo un riesgo porque creo que están en aguas peligrosas, y mientras el comité los apoye, quiero decir que no sé qué más podría haber hecho como persona.

src: Swindon were in no danger of being eliminated from the third round … just to make sure player manager Glenn Hoddle hammered them into the lead after just three minutes …
mt: Swindon no corría peligro de ser eliminado en la tercera ronda... solo para asegurarse de que el jugador-entrenador Glenn Hoddle los llevara a la cima después de solo tres minutos...

src: I mean, she sort of proposed the idea to you, with, if the wife was, presumably, the husband in other cases was mad beyond belief, it was a good reason for casting her off.
mt: Es decir, ella te propuso la idea, con la que, si la esposa era, presumiblemente, el marido en otros casos estaba loca de atar, era una buena razón para deshacerse de ella.

src: The model most often cited by development economists is Ghana, which adopted IMF-backed reform in 1983 after its old protectionist ways stifled initiative and devastated the economy.
mt: El modelo más citado por los economistas del desarrollo es el de Ghana, que adoptó una reforma respaldada por el FMI en 1983 después de que sus antiguas formas proteccionistas reprimieran la iniciativa y devastaran la economía.

src: Then he thoroughly enjoyed himself at some clay-pigeons, again laser-style.
mt: Luego, él se divirtió muchísimo con unos pichones de arcilla, de nuevo al estilo láser.

src: We will remain committed to our decision.
mt: Seguiremos comprometidos con nuestra decisión.

src: It leaves me without any help or support as far as the debt's concerned.
mt: Non mi lascia alcuna possibilità di aiuto o supporto per quanto riguarda il debito.

src: In the 1850s and 1860s, before cold storage was introduced, the butchered meat trade was seasonal, the heaviest burden falling in the coldest months of the year, between September and May.
mt: Negli anni '50 e '60 dell'Ottocento, prima che venisse introdotto il frigorifero, il commercio della carne macellata era stagionale, con il carico più pesante nei mesi più freddi dell'anno, tra settembre e maggio.

src: British trade union leaders were, it seemed, being called upon to pay the piper when they were not even being allowed to have control.
mt: Los líderes de los sindicatos británicos, al parecer, estaban siendo llamados a pagar la piper cuando ni siquiera se les permitía tener el control.

src: Phil Collins has become an essential focal point for the band, his success as a solo artist no doubt intensifying the situation — and many more of the CD generation to the audience.
mt: Phil Collins se ha convertido en un punto focal esencial para la banda, su éxito como artista solitario intensificó sin duda la situación, y muchos más de la generación del CD están en el público.

src: She will continue as long as possible playing doubles, saying: ‘I will keep going for as long as I can.’
mt: Ella seguirá jugando dobles el mayor tiempo posible, diciendo: “Seguiré jugando mientras pueda”.

src: We could all have thought of suitable answers to that one, but the rigid framework in which we lived dictated that we button up our lips, keep our thoughts to ourselves and suffer in silence.
mt: Tutti avremmo potuto pensare a risposte adeguate a quella domanda, ma il rigido contesto in cui vivevamo imponeva di tenere le labbra serrate, di tenere i pensieri per noi stessi e di soffrire in silenzio.

src: And it is thought the boss admitted the truth before the affair was revealed in a newspaper.
mt: Se cree que el jefe admitió la verdad antes de que el asunto se revelara en un periódico.

src: Such a tax is often claimed to encourage saving but the argument can have opposing effects.
mt: Si bien se suele afirmar que un impuesto de este tipo fomenta el ahorro, el argumento puede tener efectos opuestos.

src: Skates, his ruthless beancounting skills surfacing, is straightforward about suggesting that if any more job cuts can be made, they will be.
mt: Skates, con sus despiadadas habilidades para contar frijoles, es directo al sugerir que si se pueden hacer más recortes de empleos, se harán.

src: Young next to old, doing well next to struggling: a heterogeneous mass present for its own mutually exclusive reasons.
mt: Giovani accanto a vecchi, quelli che vanno bene accanto a quelli che fanno fatica: una massa eterogenea presente per le proprie ragioni reciprocamente esclusive.

src: allusion to the saying ‘ Little pitchers have very sharp hearing ’, meaning that children can hear very well.
mt: allusione al detto "I piccoli vasi hanno un udito molto acuto", che significa che i bambini sentono molto bene.

src: Most record-company chiefs had risen to their position by one of two ways; either they were ‘record men’ who were naturally inclined, who by their own taste and judgement had quietly built their own companies, or had risen through the sales and marketing ranks of some multinational to positions of prominence; or they were lawyers or accountants, practised in the art of negotiation and creative bookkeeping.
mt: La maggior parte dei capi delle case discografiche aveva raggiunto la propria posizione in uno dei due modi seguenti: erano “uomini del disco” che per inclinazione naturale, grazie al proprio gusto e giudizio, avevano costruito in silenzio le proprie aziende, o erano saliti attraverso i ranghi delle vendite e del marketing di alcune multinazionali fino a posizioni di rilievo; oppure erano avvocati o contabili, esperti nell’arte della negoziazione e della contabilità creativa.

src: I think it would be extremely prudent of you to avoid drawing attention to yourself for the next few days.
mt: Creo que sería extremadamente prudente que evitara llamar la atención sobre usted mismo durante los próximos días.

src: It would not be long before de Lattre faced the divisions of Giap's new model army in the set-piece battles which the Vietminh were prepared to risk in a premature general offensive; and it was in more conventional war of this kind where US assistance and particularly US munitions would apparently give a decisive advantage.
mt: Non sarebbe passato molto tempo prima che de Lattre si trovasse di fronte alle divisioni del nuovo esercito modello di Giap nelle battaglie a turni che i Vietminh erano pronti a rischiare in un'offensiva generale prematura; e fu in una guerra più convenzionale di questo tipo che l'assistenza degli USA e in particolare le munizioni statunitensi avrebbero dato un vantaggio decisivo.

src: Now that I recall, I did hear that those nuns had caught themselves a gypsy.
mt: Ahora que lo recuerdo, sí escuché que esas monjas habían atrapado a un gitano.

src: Christmas looks to be a time for making peace or re-examining past conflicts.
mt: Il Natale sembra essere un momento per fare pace o per rivedere i conflitti del passato.

mt: Alamena, la esposa de Boz, le está haciendo la vida difícil a ella, diciéndole que no debe abandonar el campamento y que es demasiado directa con todos.

src: Boy, thought Jay, am I ever learning my lesson.
mt: Vaya, pensó Jay, que si que estoy aprendiendo la lección.

src: I'm giving her a reduced rate for a while, so if anything goes wrong we'll bear the cost.
mt: Le estoy dando una tarifa reducida por un tiempo, así que si algo sale mal, nosotros tendremos el costo.

mt: Varios compañeros de juego le pidieron a ella que les diera una vuelta como pasajeros, pero ese privilegio parecía estar reservado para los miembros de su séquito habitual, aunque supongo que podría argumentarse que le dio a Steffi Graf un partido muy duro en las semifinales.

src: Sons and spouses attended the meeting, having prepared beforehand that they would tell their mother personally that they could not offer her a home, but would stay in communication with her.
mt: Los hijos y los cónyuges asistieron a la reunión, habiendo preparado de antemano que le dirían a su madre personalmente que no podían ofrecerle una casa, pero que permanecerían en comunicación con ella.

src: With supporters of human rights having a significant impact in virtually every country of the world, perhaps it was appropriate that Mr Martin's last foreign visit as secretary general was to the remote alpine kingdom of Bhutan where he discussed the plight of the Nepali-speaking people with King Jigme Wangchuck.
mt: Con i sostenitori dei diritti umani che hanno un impatto significativo in quasi tutti i paesi del mondo, forse è stato opportuno che l'ultima visita all'estero del signor Martin come segretario generale sia stata al remoto regno alpino del Bhutan, dove ha discusso della difficile situazione del popolo di lingua nepalese con il re Jigme Wangchuck.

src: Far from slaking his thirst, all his weekend with her had done was heighten his desire and leave him with a desperate craving for more.
mt: Lejos de saciar su sed, todo lo que había hecho su fin de semana con ella fue aumentar su deseo y dejarlo con un anhelo desesperado de más.

src: This does not mean that you have to spend a fortune on tools, but beware of cheap spanners and screwdrivers which may not be strong enough for the job or of cheap hammers whose heads may break off.
mt: Questo non significa che bisogna spendere una fortuna in attrezzi, ma attenzione alle chiavi e ai cacciaviti economici che potrebbero non essere abbastanza resistenti per il lavoro o ai martelli economici le cui teste potrebbero rompersi.

src: She was obviously (it seemed to Sam) thinking very hard to come up with something.
mt: Obviamente (le pareció a Sam) estaba pensando muy duro para llegar a algo.

mt: Concentrarsi su Emma l'aiutò a tenere lontane le sue preoccupazioni per un po'.

mt: Ella apreciaba las líneas limpias de un buen diseño, ¿verdad?

mt: Es decir, cuando llegas a ese nivel en el que juegas en estadios y ya no es nada especial, sabes que algo salió mal.

src: Maggie kept attracting her notice with an expression of knowing amusement, but at the same time she obviously hated having these men stomping through her every possession and destroying any remaining magic in her secret chamber.

src: THIS is the week that could determine the success or failure of John Major's Government and the British economy.
mt: ESTA es la semana que podría determinar el éxito o el fracaso del gobierno de John Major y de la economía británica.

src: You can so aim your plot that the events you will have to describe reflect on whatever current preoccupation of society it is that has inspired you; your theme.

src: All of this activity has meant that aircraft and artefact restoration has necessarily taken to the back-burner, but, to quote one of the volunteers: ‘no building, no aircraft ultimately’.
mt: Toda esta actividad ha hecho que la restauración de aviones y artefactos se haya pospuesto, pero, para citar a uno de los voluntarios: “sin edificio, no hay aviones en última instancia”.

mt: Charity estaba bastante acostumbrada a que su primo suscitara respuestas bastante dramáticas de la población masculina, pero se sintió un poco desconcertada cuando Nelson, un chico alto y delgado con pelo arenoso y buen aspecto, pareció estar enamorado de ella.

src: The sound of a slammed door and the pitter patter sound of a girl fleeing in terror, were the only sounds which could be heard that frosty, November morning.
mt: El sonido de una puerta que se cerraba con fuerza y el sonido de los pasos de una chica que huía aterrorizada eran los únicos sonidos que se podían oír en esa gélida mañana de noviembre.

src: The Northern Echo poll is ludicrously inconsistent with national opinion polls and inconsistent with our own survey figures.
mt: La encuesta de Northern Echo es ridículamente inconsistente con las encuestas de opinión nacionales y con las cifras de nuestra propia encuesta.

src: ‘Stop throwing good money after bad, Woolley.’

src: He was a young man who was just a young boy, he was promoting records and trying to get into the business and, and he remembered me well, and when they found out that I was not easy to reach, no-one knew where I was, he was able to track me down and when he told me that I had this big hit record, I thought it was someone pulling my leg, because here in America, they have a television show called The Blue Bird, where they play tricks on people and, and tell them things, and then they videotape you and then there's a funny reaction that this is a big television show.
mt: Era un joven que era solo un niño, promocionaba discos y trataba de entrar en el negocio y, y él me recordaba bien, y cuando descubrieron que no era fácil de alcanzar, nadie sabía dónde estaba, él pudo localizarme y cuando me dijo que tenía este gran éxito, pensé que era alguien que me estaba engañando, porque aquí en Estados Unidos, tienen un programa de televisión llamado The Blue Bird, donde hacen trucos a la gente y, y les dicen cosas, y luego te graban en video y luego hay una reacción divertida de que es un gran programa de televisión.

src: It should be noted, however, that the modules which constitute the award are merely an indication of the expected level of competence to be demonstrated by office workers who hold a qualification at Level I and II.

mt: Pero aunque los críticos le dieron puntos a la cadena ABC por tomar un riesgo de programación tan costoso, la mayoría predijo que el programa era demasiado lento, demasiado extraño, en resumen, demasiado bueno para atraer al espectador estadounidense promedio.

mt: El comercio era extremadamente competitivo y los barcos se manejaban con un presupuesto muy limitado, lo que resultaba en muchas pérdidas.

src: To win your support, to get you to agree with me.

src: She adores it.

mt: Secondo l'Office of Fair Trading, ci sono prove che alcune società di prestiti scelgono le imprese che a loro volta portano affari di prestiti, quindi il vostro agente immobiliare potrebbe essere tentato di indirizzarvi verso una società di prestiti che lui deve cercare di conquistare.

src: This one wanted to do my work, but when he started telling me that personally he was against all pet shops and would like to see them closed, we did not exactly agree.
mt: Questo voleva fare il mio lavoro, ma quando ha iniziato a dirmi che personalmente era contro tutti i negozi di animali e che avrebbe voluto che fossero chiusi, non eravamo esattamente d'accordo.

src: That first tour did a lot to make the rest of the tours tremendously successful because, with all things like that, if you do play to a small group of people and you still do a great show, then through personal recommendations the news spreads about how wonderful you were, even though it wasn't packed.
mt: Esa primera gira contribuyó mucho a que el resto de giras fueran un tremendo éxito, porque, con todo tipo de cosas como esas, si tocas para un pequeño grupo de personas y aún así haces un gran espectáculo, entonces, gracias a las recomendaciones personales, la noticia se difunde sobre lo maravilloso que fuiste, aunque no estuviera lleno.

mt: Hay trozos de cebolla negra quemada, pieles de tocino petrificadas, restos marrones de huevos fritos y muchos otros bocados de tomates, salchichas, bistecs, chuletas, hígado, patatas, pan y judías cocidas que se encuentran amontonados y que habrían sido una rica recompensa para cualquier persona interesada en la dieta del señor Piggott durante el año pasado.
