mt: Eso fue en 1984, un año antes de que el Charlton se trasladara a Selhurst y Upton Parks, y dos años antes de que Walsh firmara y decidiera vivir en SE7, porque: “me prometieron que nos mudaríamos a nuestro propio estadio y quería vivir entre los fans que morían por volver”.

src: Nice bit of rock salmon, bag of chips, lots of vinegar, you 'll feel ecstatic.
mt: Un bel pezzo di salmone alla roccia, una busta di patatine, tanto aceto, e vi sentirete in estasi.

src: But we deliberately do not have much food in the fridge — that way, we prevent temptation.
mt: Ma non abbiamo intenzionalmente molto cibo nel frigo, in questo modo evitiamo la tentazione.

src: George and Alex soon realised they had been fooled.
mt: George y Alex pronto se dieron cuenta de que habían sido engañados.

src: It is good fun and it was a job worth doing but I do not want to die on the job.
mt: È divertente e è un lavoro che vale la pena fare, ma non voglio morire sul lavoro.

src: Their aim — to finish quickly and outdo each other in a competition to find the fastest draw in the country.
mt: Su objetivo: terminar rápidamente y superarse unos a otros en una competencia para encontrar el sorteo más rápido del país.

src: Not that he seemed to mind in the slightest, she acknowledged wryly, forced to clench her lips tightly in silence every time the actress materialised apparently from nowhere to spirit Dane away.
mt: No es que le importara en lo más mínimo, reconoció irónicamente, obligada a apretar los labios con fuerza en silencio cada vez que la actriz aparecía aparentemente de la nada para llevarse a Dane.

src: She'd come this far to express her opinion and express it she would, come hell or high water.
mt: Ella había llegado hasta aquí para expresar su opinión y lo haría, pase lo que pase.

src: I'm not immediately aware of anything else, but members, please think carefully as we go through, Diana?
mt: Non mi viene in mente nient'altro in questo momento, ma i membri, per favore, pensateci bene mentre procediamo, Diana?

src: The potential threat of the conveyance to the wife and new husband being put aside if the sale to the new husband could be considered to be at an undervalue must be considered (see p5 and Insolvency Act 1986, s339).
mt: La potenziale minaccia che la cessione alla moglie e al nuovo marito venga messa da parte se la vendita al nuovo marito può essere considerata a un valore inferiore deve essere presa in considerazione (vedere p5 e Insolvency Act 1986, s339).

src: Of course clubs such as Neath and Pontypool are not really supposed to be at the head of the Welsh hierarchy, which goes some way to explaining why they become so unpopular when they do.
mt: Por supuesto, clubes como Neath y Pontypool no se supone que estén realmente en la cabeza de la jerarquía galesa, lo que explica en parte por qué se vuelven tan impopulares cuando lo hacen.

src: And if Jesus was around today he would be going to the places that you and I would be reluctant to visit, not because he wanted to have a good time, but because he wanted to relate to the people who were there.
mt: Y si Jesús estuviera hoy, iría a los lugares que tú y yo no querríamos visitar, no porque quisiera pasar un buen rato, sino porque quería relacionarse con las personas que estaban allí.

src: She had also read about old people's homes that ruthlessly exploited their pensioners: unscrupulous proprietors grabbed all they could squeeze from the social services but gave little back to the residents; they reduced spending on staff, food, laundry, and amenities and added to their profits by pocketing the difference between their sparse expenditures and the sums they actually received.
mt: También había leído sobre hogares para personas mayores que explotaban despiadadamente a sus pensionistas: los propietarios sin escrúpulos se llevaban todo lo que podían exprimir a los servicios sociales, pero daban poco a cambio a los residentes; reducían el gasto en personal, comida, lavandería y servicios y añadían a sus ganancias embolsándose la diferencia entre sus escasos gastos y las sumas que realmente recibían.

src: for victory, because I'd like to dedicate myself to that.
mt: por la victoria, porque me gustaría dedicarme a eso.

src: If it is too drastic to implement such a sweeping change immediately without gradual introduction, why not try it out in experimental matches, festival or night matches?
mt: Se è troppo drastico implementare un cambiamento così radicale immediatamente senza una graduale introduzione, perché non provarlo in partite sperimentali, festival o partite notturne?

src: He was very surprised, but thrilled about the ring.
mt: Él se sorprendió mucho, pero estaba emocionado por el anillo.

src: Erm, my only view is that, er, the reason is that, by the time it was published, because remember, the manuscript was in the, the manuscript was physically in the possession of the Bullitt family not the Freud family.
mt: Bueno, mi única opinión es que, bueno, la razón es que, cuando se publicó, porque recuerden, el manuscrito estaba en, el manuscrito estaba físicamente en posesión de la familia Bullitt, no de la familia Freud.

src: Earlier I said we must take advantage of every opportunity, and I would like to offer for consideration a possible strategy for the future.
mt: In precedenza ho affermato che dobbiamo cogliere ogni opportunità e vorrei proporre una possibile strategia per il futuro.

src: Surely, if she was the caring person she makes out, she would insist on fulfilling her obligations.
mt: Sicuramente, se fosse la persona premura che dice di essere, insisterebbe per adempiere ai suoi obblighi.

src: He told Black : ‘ I pronounce this sentence with regret, but the only way to stop you driving is to put you in prison.’
mt: Dijo a Black: “Pronuncio esta sentencia con pesar, pero la única forma de impedir que conduzcas es ponerte en prisión”.

src: Shout, they'd shout something but er well since we've been living up here, my mother used to give, the man used to come for the order for the grocery, the baker used to come round, the milk used to come round, they all used to come round at she'd ha she didn't have go out for heavy loads of stuff to bring in it was all delivered, but when they started some new technique of er of ordering by computer, it's going to start over again you know, they'll be delivering stuff in the same jolly old way hey.
mt: Gritaban, gritaban algo, pero bueno, desde que vivimos aquí, mi madre solía dar órdenes, el hombre solía venir a pedir la comida, el panadero solía venir, la leche solía venir, todos solían venir cuando ella tenía que no tenía que salir para llevarse grandes cargas de cosas, todo se entregaba, pero cuando empezaron con una nueva técnica de hacer pedidos por ordenador, todo va a empezar de nuevo, ya sabes, van a entregar las cosas de la misma forma alegre de antes.

src: Square Mile : Stock Exchange confronts the challenge head-on.
mt: Square Mile: la Borsa affronta la sfida.

src: It is certainly true that the climate for attracting new recruits to the professions is not improved by continued reporting on the negative aspects of working in the NHS.
mt: È certamente vero che il clima per attrarre nuove reclute nelle professioni non è migliorato dalla continua segnalazione degli aspetti negativi del lavoro nel NHS.

src: The government of the Republic of Hungary will become the first East European administration to adopt an open system strategy in all areas, saying it intends to use X / Open Group Co Ltd's XPG brand in procurement and is to join X / Open's user council : a government action plan on information technology has been put together with the assistance of the European Commission and individual national governments within the EEC.
mt: Il governo della Repubblica di Ungheria diventerà la prima amministrazione dell'Europa dell'Est ad adottare una strategia di sistema aperto in tutti gli ambiti, affermando di voler utilizzare il marchio XPG di X/Open Group Co Ltd per gli appalti e di voler aderire al consiglio degli utenti di X/Open: un piano d'azione governativo sulle tecnologie dell'informazione è stato elaborato con l'assistenza della Commissione europea e dei singoli governi nazionali all'interno della CEE.

src: He said he had received a letter completely unexpectedly, asking if the museum would like it.
mt: Dijo que había recibido una carta totalmente inesperada, preguntando si el museo la quería.

src: I needed them as much as they needed me and I happily accepted both the good and the bad.
mt: Avevo bisogno di loro come loro avevano bisogno di me e ho accettato volentieri sia il bene che il male.

src: Medieval European cavalries later put political power into the hands of the wealthy, who could afford to support horses and their groomsmen, but the return of mass armies in the fifteenth and sixteenth centuries often reversed the situation.
mt: Le cavallerie medievali europee hanno poi messo il potere politico nelle mani dei ricchi, che potevano permettersi di mantenere cavalli e groomsmen, ma il ritorno degli eserciti di massa nel XV e nel XVI secolo ha spesso capovolto la situazione.

src: Following in the footsteps of advertising agencies who gained great riches and new respectability when many became publicly quoted companies, public relations as a business matured as an industry in the early 1980s when the first consultancy went public on the Unlisted Securities Market.
mt: Seguendo le orme delle agenzie pubblicitarie, che hanno guadagnato grandi ricchezze e nuova rispettabilità quando molte sono diventate società quotate in borsa, le pubbliche relazioni come attività commerciale si sono sviluppate come industria nei primi anni '80, quando la prima società di consulenza è diventata pubblica sul mercato dei titoli non quotati.

src: 'Throw away the chip pan!'say the coronary experts ;'Eat plenty of fruit and vegetables '.
mt: "Buttate via la padella per friggere!" dicono gli esperti di malattie coronariche; "Mangiate molta frutta e verdura".

src: A group of American venture capitalists issued strict instructions to European hopefuls at the Etre conference in Vienna a couple of weeks ago.
mt: Un grupo de capitalistas de riesgo estadounidenses emitió instrucciones estrictas a los aspirantes europeos en la conferencia Etre celebrada en Viena hace un par de semanas.

src: He tried to tell himself that it didn't matter, that you could find the same situation all over the West End ; back in the happier times he could remember taking his wife to a performance of Jesus Christ, Superstar when it had gone through so many cast changes that no - one was even bothering to count, and what a bunch of wankers they 'd been.
mt: Él intentó decirse a sí mismo que no importaba, que la misma situación podía encontrarse en todo el West End; en los tiempos más felices que recordaba, había llevado a su mujer a una representación de Jesus Christ, Superstar cuando había habido tantos cambios de reparto que nadie se había molestado ni siquiera en contarlos, y qué grupo de idiotas habían sido.

src: Accounts and from the Mill got married on Saturday, April 3, followed by a romantic honeymoon in Tunisia.
mt: Accounts y Mill se casaron el sábado 3 de abril, y luego disfrutaron de una romántica luna de miel en Túnez.

src: We've lots of gift ideas and, if you act quickly, you could win one of our giveaways on pages 12 and 13.
mt: Abbiamo molte idee regalo e, se agisci in fretta, potresti vincere uno dei nostri omaggi alle pagine 12 e 13.

src: Anyone who has ever suffered at the hands of military pomposity will relish the story of General Patton inspecting a hospital in France and screaming abuse at a man for not standing at attention in his presence, only to be told ‘ Run along, asshole.
mt: Cualquier persona que haya sufrido alguna vez a manos de la pompa militar disfrutará la historia del general Patton inspeccionando un hospital en Francia y gritando insultos a un hombre por no estar de pie en su presencia, para que le dijeran: “Vete a la mierda, idiota.

src: Multiples such as W.H. Smith will certainly not miss out but the more traditional, book-focused groups may not even know there is an opportunity to be seized.
mt: I grandi gruppi come W.H. Smith non mancheranno di cogliere l’opportunità, ma i gruppi più tradizionali, incentrati sui libri, potrebbero non essere nemmeno a conoscenza dell’opportunità che si presenta.

src: Now some of his players are saying it's time he was honest and declared his intentions.
mt: Ahora, algunos de sus jugadores dicen que ha llegado la hora de que sea honesto y declare sus intenciones.

src: Tents had gone up and the temporary occupants were busy settling in.
mt: Las tiendas de campaña se habían levantado y los ocupantes temporales estaban ocupados instalándose.

src: Every time I do a stall, I get extremely nervous up until I do it, and then I feel great when we're doing it, and afterwards realize that it's been productive and we have had a good response from the public.
mt: Cada vez que hago una parada, me pongo muy nervioso hasta que lo hago, y luego me siento genial cuando lo hacemos, y después me doy cuenta de que ha sido productivo y que hemos tenido una buena respuesta del público.

src: The authority's book deals with the principles and practice of growing quality broadleaved timber, considering landscape design, amenity, value to wildlife, and conservation.
mt: Il libro dell'autorità tratta i principi e le pratiche della coltivazione di legname a foglia larga di qualità, considerando la progettazione del paesaggio, la bellezza, il valore per la fauna selvatica e la conservazione.

src: The bureaucrat is assumed typically to know more than the sponsor about factor costs and production processes involved in the bureau's services.
mt: Si ritiene che il burocrate sappia di più dello sponsor sui costi dei fattori e sui processi di produzione coinvolti nei servizi dell'ufficio.

src: They got the wrong island, wrong producers, so what do they know, going on about these mad drug stories and us not organizing ourselves?
mt: Consiguieron la isla equivocada, los productores equivocados, así que, ¿qué saben ellos, hablando de estas historias locas de drogas y de que no nos hemos organizado?

src: Fortunately, their gibes have been ignored and all the more credit is due to those gentlemen who, in face of considerable discouragement, have succeeded to such a marked extent.
mt: Per fortuna, le loro provocazioni sono state ignorate e va dato ancora più credito a quei signori che, nonostante il notevole scoraggiamento, sono riusciti in misura così significativa.

src: In fact, it's sometimes said that it's one of the very great privileges of the public that they can, by writing something, and putting it in an envelope with a stamp on it, get it to arrive on an editor's desk, and have the editor at least give a cursory glance if not a more serious glance at what's going on, so it's a privilege and it's an opportunity in that case.
mt: De hecho, a veces se dice que es uno de los grandes privilegios del público que, al escribir algo y ponerlo en un sobre con un sello, puede llegar a la mesa de un editor y que el editor, al menos, eche un vistazo superficial, si no es que más serio, a lo que está pasando, así que es un privilegio y una oportunidad en ese caso.

src: Ulster people urged to be mindful of their words.
mt: A la gente de Ulster se le pide que tenga cuidado con sus palabras.

src: In practice though only a minority actually do it and turn armchair fantasy into reality.
mt: En la práctica, sin embargo, solo una minoría lo hace realmente y convierte la fantasía de sillón en realidad.

src: I'm no stud, to be used to settle a score against another man, and I intend to think with my brain, not act impulsively or unscrupulously, despite any present evidence to the contrary!
mt: Non sono uno stallone, da usare per regolare i conti con un altro uomo, e intendo pensare con il mio cervello, non agire impulsivamente o senza scrupoli, nonostante le prove presenti che dimostrino il contrario!

src: So, you know, whilst I'm a little bit reluctant in a way, I think that's a past issue that can't be changed, and in my view actually the extension improves it all.
mt: Quindi, anche se in un certo senso sono un po' riluttante, penso che sia un problema del passato che non può essere cambiato e, a mio avviso, l'estensione migliora tutto.

src: ‘Over two packs a day, very foolish for a diabetic, but she hadn't accepted the reality of the illness at that stage, and was quite defiant about a number of things, Professor Rankin tells me.’
mt: “Más de dos paquetes al día, muy tonto para un diabético, pero ella no había aceptado la realidad de la enfermedad en esa etapa y era bastante desafiante sobre varias cosas, me dice el profesor Rankin”.

src: Wolves play a similar style, and at times one yearned for someone to start something … literally.
mt: Los Wolves juegan un estilo parecido, y a veces uno anhela que alguien empiece algo… literalmente.

src: When it was Lord Thurso's time to speak he was able to joke "Your Territorial Commander and I are in complete agreement.
mt: Cuando llegó la hora de que Lord Thurso hablara, pudo bromear: “Su comandante territorial y yo estamos totalmente de acuerdo.

src: The day took a turn for the worse after that.
mt: El día tomó un giro para peor después de eso.

src: Bognor today is a shabby, run-down place.
mt: Bognor hoy es un lugar decrépito y deteriorado.

src: A couple of wretches on the run, skulking in the bushes on the lookout for prey, would never have dared emerge from hiding and try their luck with us.
mt: Un par de desgraciados fugitivos, merodeando entre los arbustos a la espera de su presa, nunca se habrían atrevido a salir de su escondite y a probar suerte con nosotros.

src: Less than a year later Rust and Sabrina were on a routine stakeout at the Marseilles docks when they were shot at by a gang of drug smugglers and Rust was hit in the spine, leaving him paralysed from the waist down.
mt: Menos de un año después, Rust y Sabrina estaban en una vigilancia rutinaria en los muelles de Marsella cuando fueron atacados a tiros por una banda de traficantes de drogas y Rust recibió un disparo en la columna vertebral que lo dejó paralizado desde la cintura para abajo.

src: Many experts believe the flow could become a torrent if the government ever successfully resolves the debt and property problems still hanging over the east.
mt: Molti esperti ritengono che il flusso potrebbe diventare un torrente se il governo riuscisse a risolvere i problemi del debito e della proprietà che ancora pesano sull'est.

src: He was like an old car that had existed for a long time in the neighbourhood, loaned out among your friends, used and passed on, so that when it got to you in your time, you knew what you were getting.
mt: Era como un viejo coche que había existido durante mucho tiempo en el barrio, prestado entre amigos, usado y pasado de mano en mano, de modo que cuando te llegaba a ti en tu tiempo, sabías lo que te estaba llegando.

src: He had to entertain Michael Crawford lavishly to convince him that he was capable of delivering a virtuoso performance as The Phantom Of The Opera.
mt: Él tuvo que entretener a Michael Crawford de forma lujosa para convencerlo de que era capaz de ofrecer una actuación virtuosa como El Fantasma de la Ópera.

src: If they have been used to rushing home from work or waiting for the time to pass during any stolen time with friends, they may find it hard to adapt to the fact that there is no longer any need to hurry back.
mt: Se sono stati abituati a correre a casa dal lavoro o ad aspettare che il tempo passi durante il poco tempo libero con gli amici, potrebbe essere difficile per loro adattarsi al fatto che non c’è più bisogno di tornare in fretta.

src: Sometimes I wake early to get a head start.
mt: A volte mi sveglio presto per avere un vantaggio.

src: If he did, he was in an enviable position to manipulate her or engage in a clever game of deception for the duration of their stay.
mt: Si lo hizo, él estaba en una posición envidable para manipularla o participar en un ingenioso juego de engaños durante la duración de su estadía.

src: That's where you go when you're angry?
mt: ¿Es a donde vas cuando estás enojada?

src: There is no need to know any economics in order to be fascinated by this book : it is about nothing other than power.
mt: Non è necessario conoscere l'economia per essere affascinati da questo libro: non parla di nient'altro che di potere.

src: We used to tease him about this, asking him if he could remember which one it was tonight, and it goes without saying that the two girls were not even on nodding terms with each other.
mt: Solíamos burlarnos de él por eso, preguntándole si recordaba cuál era esta noche, y ni que decir tiene que las dos chicas ni siquiera se saludaban.

src: It was, it was very nice except that Fred had a piece and left the last couple of slices in the tin on the side and the dog liked it so it was in a tin and then in the dog.
mt: Sí, fue muy bueno, excepto que Fred comió una porción y dejó las últimas rebanadas en la lata a un lado y al perro le gustaron, así que estaban en la lata y luego en el perro.

src: YOU never know who's listening when you're presenting.
mt: Nunca se sabe quién está escuchando cuando se está presentando.

src: In the three years after his retirement, Britain chalked up no fewer than four prime ministers until Earl Grey managed to succeed him.
mt: En los tres años posteriores a su jubilación, Gran Bretaña tuvo nada menos que cuatro primeros ministros hasta que el conde de Grey logró sucederlo.

src: I feel they're putting units into this country, why not us put a unit into their country, not to kill their women and children, but to kill the people who's actually doing it, whether they be I R A, U D A, knock 'em out, let's put an end to it.
mt: Siento que están poniendo unidades en este país, ¿por qué no ponemos una unidad en su país, no para matar a sus mujeres y niños, sino para matar a las personas que realmente lo están haciendo, ya sea I R A, U D A, noquítelos, pongamos fin a esto.

src: Without wishing to jinx things in any way, we appear to have got away lightly insofar as Winter is concerned.
mt: Senza voler fare il presagio di nulla, sembra che siamo usciti indenni da questo inverno.

src: Despite an outcry from local Labour Parties, the leadership easily emerged victorious at the Labour Party conference at Southport in June.
mt: A pesar de las protestas de los partidos laboristas locales, el liderazgo salió fácilmente victorioso en la conferencia del Partido Laborista celebrada en Southport en junio.

src: He had always favoured Em — clearly — and Em had been quite wrong to post herself to Norfolk in the first place.
mt: Él siempre había favorecido a Em (claro está) y Em había estado bastante equivocada al enviarse a Norfolk en primer lugar.

src: We think we are in agreement with the county council on this, provided it is clearly in the acceptable needs of the district and will be met by taking areas of countryside.
mt: Creemos que estamos de acuerdo con el consejo de la comarca en este punto, siempre que se trate de necesidades claramente aceptables del distrito y que se satisfagan tomando zonas del campo.

src: People around here have taken it up with different parties but everyone seems to shift the responsibility.
mt: La gente de aquí se lo ha planteado a diferentes partidos, pero todo el mundo parece querer pasar la responsabilidad.

src: Perhaps my attempts to undermine the manager's credibility are finally being realized at last : ) ) )
mt: Forse i miei tentativi di minare la credibilità del manager stanno finalmente dando i loro frutti :) ) ) )

src: The rule of sport by amateurs prevented capitalism from dominating British sport.
mt: La regla del deporte por los aficionados impidió que el capitalismo dominara el deporte británico.

src: Industry watchdog Lautro could have banned the company from selling investment products altogether, but decided not to because it had been co-operative and had acted promptly to enhance its sales methods.
mt: L’autorità di vigilanza del settore, Lautro, avrebbe potuto vietare alla società di vendere prodotti di investimento del tutto, ma ha deciso di non farlo perché era stata cooperativa e aveva agito prontamente per migliorare i suoi metodi di vendita.

src: Newspaper staff appeared brave.
mt: El personal del periódico se mostró valiente.

src: But, whatever their knowledge, of far greater importance in official thinking was the strategic value of a power source which lent itself naturally to centralized control, which was operated by a well-paid, reliable work-force and which would continue to control the miners.
mt: Ma, qualunque fosse la loro conoscenza, di gran lunga più importante nel pensiero ufficiale era il valore strategico di una fonte di energia che si prestava naturalmente a un controllo centralizzato, che era gestito da una forza lavoro ben pagata e affidabile e che avrebbe continuato a controllare i minatori.

src: Angry Brian Reatus, 44, allegedly flew into a rage as he pinned him to the wall.
mt: El enfadado Brian Reatus, de 44 años, supuestamente se puso furioso cuando lo sujetó contra la pared.

src: The congress was held in private, and the exclusion of foreign journalists and overseas political delegations encouraged speculation that political divisions existed between the party leadership and membership, represented by 1,800 delegates.
mt: El congreso se celebró en privado y la exclusión de periodistas extranjeros y delegaciones políticas extranjeras fomentó las especulaciones sobre la existencia de divisiones políticas entre los líderes del partido y los miembros, representados por 1.800 delegados.

src: Rod, working on his own life story with a ghost writer, has promised: ‘I am going to investigate everything thoroughly — I intend to delve deeply into the numerous stains I have left on the tapestry of life.’
mt: Rod, que está trabajando en su propia historia de vida con un escritor fantasma, prometió: “Voy a investigar todo a fondo, tengo la intención de profundizar en las numerosas manchas que he dejado en el tapiz de la vida”.

src: It is a ludicrous situation and we should start over and begin anew.
mt: Es una situación ridícula y deberíamos empezar de nuevo.

src: But ultimately, a company's reputation and success depend heavily on its being a responsible citizen and caring neighbour.
mt: Ma in definitiva, la reputazione e il successo di un’azienda dipendono in gran parte dal fatto che sia un cittadino responsabile e un vicino premuroso.

src: (James Brown, 20/2/88 who made it Single Of The Week along with The Wedding Present's ‘ Nobody's Forcing You ’ )
mt: (James Brown, 20/2/88, que lo convirtió en el single de la semana junto con «Nobody's Forcing You» de The Wedding Present)

src: The recent statement made by junior minister Baroness Cumberlege, implying that the Government would not object should doctors decide to withhold treatment from patients who refuse to stop smoking, gave me much to think about.
mt: La reciente declaración de la ministra junior, la baronesa Cumberlege, en la que insinuaba que el Gobierno no se opondría si los médicos decidieran no tratar a los pacientes que se nieguen a dejar de fumar, me dio mucho que pensar.

src: Well, he gave me half-a-crown, so I had to show my appreciation by informin' him.
mt: Bueno, me dio media corona, así que tuve que mostrarle mi agradecimiento informándole.

src: De Gaulle was little interested in AFPs. He considered it normal that he who pays has control: ‘ qui paie commande ’.
mt: De Gaulle aveva scarso interesse per le AFP. Considerava normale che chi paga abbia il controllo: "chi paga comanda".

src: In extreme cases, unjustified delay can render a dismissal unfair even in a case where a similar penalty would have been legitimate had management not delayed unnecessarily.
mt: In casi estremi, un ritardo ingiustificato può rendere il licenziamento ingiusto anche nel caso in cui una sanzione simile sarebbe stata legittima se la direzione non avesse inutilmente ritardato.

src: But last week the Conservative candidate in Belfast's Victoria Ward Jim McCormick — who polled 684 first preference votes — completely backed our story.
mt: Pero la semana pasada, el candidato conservador en el distrito de Victoria de Belfast, Jim McCormick, que obtuvo 684 votos de primera preferencia, respaldó completamente nuestra historia.

src: He has influential connections.
mt: Tiene conexiones influyentes.

src: That prevented Rough Trade's financial downfall, as it turned out.
mt: Eso evitó la caída financiera de Rough Trade, como resultó.

src: I think it was Louis from the start.
mt: Creo que fue Louis desde el principio.

src: He was beginning to annoy her.
mt: Él empezaba a molestarla.

src: My singing career sort of launched through the show too because it was when a few of us from the show got together to sing at a benefit concert for a football club in Australia that I first publicly sang ‘The Locomotion.’
mt: Mi carrera como cantante también se lanzó gracias a la serie, porque fue cuando algunos de nosotros de la serie nos reunimos para cantar en un concierto benéfico para un club de fútbol en Australia que canté por primera vez en público «The Locomotion».

src: Richard Dorment of the Daily Telegraph said : ‘ What a pity a dealer did not take him aside and tell him the work he proposed to exhibit was unexhibitable … a visual boredom so total that no amount of metaphor or allusion can revitalize it ’.
mt: Richard Dorment del Daily Telegraph dijo: “¿Qué lástima que un comerciante no lo llevara a un lado y le dijera que la obra que proponía exhibir era imposible de exhibir... un aburrimiento visual tan total que ninguna cantidad de metáfora o alusión puede revitalizarlo”.

src: Dammit, Leonora, I thought you understood I was making every effort not to rush you.
mt: Maldición, Leonora, pensé que entendías que estaba haciendo todo lo posible para no apurarte.

src: You cannot be tentative or apprehensive in your movements; you have to act boldly without worrying about the consequences and ‘attack’ a manoeuvre with the objective clearly in your mind.
mt: Non puoi essere tentennante o apprensivo nei tuoi movimenti; devi agire con coraggio senza preoccuparti delle conseguenze e “attaccare” una manovra con l’obiettivo chiaramente nella tua mente.

src: One claim guaranteed to spark criticism from Kylie is that she missed out on a childhood because of showbiz.
mt: Una afirmación que seguro que provocará las críticas de Kylie es que ella se perdió su infancia por el mundo del espectáculo.

src: In the last hour of play, however, he played with great accuracy to hold off the Dutch grandmaster.
mt: Sin embargo, en la última hora de juego, jugó con gran precisión para retener al gran maestro holandés.

src: Fokker is negotiating with Lockheed to assemble aircraft in America : this would bring Lockheed back into the commercial business, which it quit in 1981 after suffering heavy financial losses with the TriStar.
mt: Fokker está negociando con Lockheed para ensamblar aviones en Estados Unidos: esto haría que Lockheed volviera al negocio comercial, del que se retiró en 1981 después de sufrir grandes pérdidas financieras con el TriStar.

src: Efforts are now being made to lift the aircraft from its watery grave and preserve it locally.
mt: Ahora se están haciendo esfuerzos para levantar el avión de su tumba acuática y preservarlo localmente.

src: But you can assume that you have the contract.
mt: Ma si può presumere di avere il contratto.

src: He shook his head, and really made her more curious by hinting, ‘ We are so close to it, we could walk there in less than ten minutes. ’
mt: Él negó con la cabeza y, de hecho, la hizo más curiosa al insinuar: “Estamos tan cerca que podríamos ir andando en menos de diez minutos”.

src: The team manager was well aware of it, knew that it was reaching a critical point, but took no action.
mt: Il team manager ne era ben consapevole, sapeva che si stava raggiungendo un punto critico, ma non ha fatto nulla.

src: Emmerdale ( ITV, 7.00pm ) : Lyn asserts her authority over Turner … and Pollard takes a risk to defy it.
mt: Emmerdale (ITV, 7:00 p. m.): Lyn afirma su autoridad sobre Turner... y Pollard se arriesga a desafiarla.

src: ‘Never saw the bugger,’ he said.
mt: “Nunca vi al desgraciado”, dijo.

src: Delaney finally got it exactly right.
mt: Delaney finalmente lo hizo exactamente bien.

src: Roy's customers think the council has become crazy.
mt: Los clientes de Roy piensan que el ayuntamiento se ha vuelto loco.

src: It stood within a ring of hissing pressure lamps which warded off the darkness.
mt: Se encontraba dentro de un anillo de lámparas de presión que silbaban y que repelieron la oscuridad.

src: Peskin has been buying property at extremely low prices ahead of recovery.
mt: Peskin ha estado comprando propiedades a precios extremadamente bajos antes de la recuperación.

src: Studi's pack of baying, war-painted Hurons are the kind of scalping psychotics who would think Dances With Wolves is a film for the faint-hearted.
mt: La banda de Studi de Hurones aulladores y pintados de guerra son el tipo de psicópatas que piensan que «Danzas con lobos» es una película para pusilánimes.

src: She is too slow, he is already out, waiting, standing unembarrassed on the platform ready to help her.
mt: Ella es demasiado lenta, él ya está fuera, esperando, de pie y sin vergüenza en la plataforma, listo para ayudarla.

src: Gave me more laughs than any Leeds player especially when intoxicated he began trying to control the ball with his feet.
mt: Me hizo reír más que cualquier otro jugador del Leeds, especialmente cuando, bajo los efectos del alcohol, empezó a intentar controlar el balón con los pies.

src: A suited smart alec, joining rugby union's suddenly careering shamateur bandwagon, this week told a group of British international players that they should soon be able to charge £ 1,500 for a solitary interview.
mt: Un elegante caballero, que se unió a la banda de aficionados al rugby que de repente se han vuelto profesionales, dijo esta semana a un grupo de jugadores internacionales británicos que pronto podrían cobrar 1.500 £ por una entrevista solitaria.

src: Large-scale, publicly-owned enterprises will die and wither away well before the state which spawned them.
mt: Le grandi imprese pubbliche moriranno e scompariranno molto prima dello Stato che le ha generate.

src: But Mr Zogby of the Arab-American Institute believes that the war in the Gulf, far from setting the cause back, may be a moment of opportunity : ‘ The United States ’, he says, ‘ now knows that it will need to establish better relations with the Middle East.
mt: Ma Zogby dell'Arab-American Institute ritiene che la guerra nel Golfo, lungi dal far regredire la causa, potrebbe essere un momento di opportunità: "Gli Stati Uniti", dice, "ora sanno che dovranno stabilire relazioni migliori con il Medio Oriente.

src: The Jockey Club believes that ultimately Sunday racing without cash betting is impractical and it is resigned to trying to bring about a change in the legislation by a private members' bill.
mt: El Jockey Club cree que, en última instancia, las carreras del domingo sin apuestas en efectivo no son prácticas y se ha resignado a intentar lograr un cambio en la legislación mediante un proyecto de ley de miembros privados.

src: As Bailey said, the two of them never agreed.
mt: Como dijo Bailey, los dos nunca estuvieron de acuerdo.

src: I hope to leave work in a month's time and catch up on my reading.
mt: Spero di lasciare il lavoro tra un mese e recuperare le mie letture.

src: But there will be some jollification around the old homestead tonight and nobody likes to dance better than Mr. Martin.
mt: Pero habrá algo de jolgorio en la antigua casa esta noche y nadie le gusta bailar más que al señor Martin.

src: Lie back and enjoy the sensory carpet bombing ; helicopter ballets, the exploding treelines ( long before the car ads that would leave a lasting impression ), the flak jacket dolly birds, Brando's malevolent walrus, the whole of Southeast Asia as expendable theme park kaboodle.
mt: Acuéstese y disfrute del bombardeo sensorial; ballets de helicópteros, explosiones de árboles (mucho antes de los anuncios de coches que dejarían una impresión duradera), las chicas con chalecos antibalas, la maligna morsa de Brando, todo el sudeste asiático como un parque temático desechable.

src: Joshua had a vision of a packed Party conference rising to its feet to applaud a black woman Tory trade unionist who was pregnant.
mt: Joshua tuvo una visión de una conferencia del Partido llena de gente que se ponía de pie para aplaudir a una mujer negra, sindicalista Tory, que estaba embarazada.

src: Futch, 82 next birthday and a father figure among America's great boxing trainers, is the man who is in charge in heavyweight champion Riddick Bowe's gym, and it's now certain Wayne will box in a down-the-card role when Bowe defends his world title in either Washington or Atlantic City two months from now.
mt: Futch, que cumplirá 82 años el próximo cumpleaños y es una figura paterna entre los grandes entrenadores de boxeo de Estados Unidos, es el hombre a cargo del gimnasio del campeón de peso pesado Riddick Bowe, y ahora es seguro que Wayne boxeará en un papel secundario cuando Bowe defienda su título mundial en Washington o Atlantic City dentro de dos meses.

src: Dowd had been waiting for this man, Matthias McGann, to speak.
mt: Dowd había estado esperando que este hombre, Matthias McGann, hablara.

src: Those people who have been holding off buying anything just in case prices drop still further could now find they have lost their opportunity.
mt: Le persone che hanno rinviato gli acquisti nel caso i prezzi scendessero ulteriormente potrebbero ora scoprire di aver perso l’opportunità.

src: Everard stood up, embarrassed by her lack of control; the family trait had skipped him by, but it had surfaced in Kit intensely, and of course, as he might have expected, been compounded in Kit's daughter by Astrid's capriciousness.
mt: Everard se puso de pie, avergonzado por su falta de control; el rasgo familiar lo había pasado por alto, pero había surgido intensamente en Kit y, por supuesto, como él podría haber esperado, se había agravado en la hija de Kit por la caprichosidad de Astrid.

src: It left me utterly amazed, Lily.
mt: Me dejó totalmente pasmada, Lily.

src: Time to rethink our approach.
mt: È tempo di ripensare il nostro approccio.

src: Well I also was, er, er, a producer then in the BBC and so he and I had some cheerful encounters at that time, since when he has obviously become increasingly successful.
mt: Bueno, yo también era, eh, eh, productor en la BBC entonces y él y yo tuvimos algunos encuentros alegres en ese momento, desde entonces, obviamente, él ha tenido cada vez más éxito.

src: Retaliatory exchanges between the communities of Cairo did not necessarily end just because a man had been killed.
mt: Le ostilità tra le comunità del Cairo non finivano necessariamente solo perché un uomo era stato ucciso.

src: On his last point, Labour has manifestly failed to resolve the contradiction.
mt: En su último punto, el Partido Laborista ha fallado de forma manifiesta a la hora de resolver la contradicción.

src: Were his words intended to inspire her with racy images of the two of them burning up calories together between a pair of scented sheets?
mt: ¿Su intención con esas palabras era inspirarla con imágenes atrevidas de los dos quemando calorías juntos entre un par de sábanas perfumadas?

src: But if you have persevered with certain plans or associations and remained calm under pressure, your patience is about to be rewarded.
mt: Ma se hai perseverato con determinati piani o associazioni e sei rimasto calmo sotto pressione, la tua pazienza sta per essere ricompensata.

src: Showing an old photograph or object to an elderly person may be a means of jogging the memory, or establishing a rapport, and may well prompt them to reminisce.
mt: Mostrando una vecchia fotografia o un oggetto a una persona anziana può essere un mezzo per stimolare la memoria, o stabilire un rapporto, e può anche spingerli a ricordare.

src: It follows another MITI report, published this week, that criticizes America, the European Community and other large trading partners for their'unfair trading practices '.
mt: Segue un altro rapporto del MITI, pubblicato questa settimana, che critica l'America, la Comunità europea e altri grandi partner commerciali per le loro «pratiche commerciali sleali».

src: The fact that Crosby fought tooth and nail to get the job in an area where the success rate is so limited and expectation so high, clearly indicates his determination.
mt: El hecho de que Crosby luchara con uñas y dientes para conseguir el trabajo en un área donde la tasa de éxito es tan limitada y las expectativas tan altas, indica claramente su determinación.

src: We will inform you about the results of this letter-writing campaign.
mt: Vi informeremo sui risultati di questa campagna di lettere.

src: Of course, she still wasn't as good as Gesner, she didn't outperform him by any means.
mt: Por supuesto, ella aún no era tan buena como Gesner, no lo superó en ningún sentido.

src: But ultimately, I mean, he's sure gon na turn round and do it to us.
mt: Pero, en última instancia, estoy segura de que va a dar la vuelta y nos lo hará a nosotros.

src: Of course, Jim had instantly seen what I'd missed from the start with my stupid envy.
mt: Por supuesto, Jim había visto instantáneamente lo que yo había perdido desde el principio con mi estúpida envidia.

src: Osborn fired home the 63rd minute winner against the run of play after Nigel Martyn had prevented them from taking the lead with a string of England-class saves.
mt: Osborn marcó el gol de la victoria en el minuto 63 contra el curso del juego después de que Nigel Martyn les hubiera impedido tomar la delantera con una serie de paradas de clase inglesa.

src: She had seen them on their expensive horses, swooping across country, confident and in command of their horses.
mt: Ella los había visto en sus caros caballos, cruzando el país con confianza y dominando a sus caballos.

src: But if the consensus is one of conviction, then dissent, however surprising, will not be unwarranted in the same way, because everyone will recognize that an attack on the substantive case for the proposition is an attack on the proposition itself.
mt: Ma se il consenso è basato sulla convinzione, allora il dissenso, per quanto sorprendente, non sarà ingiustificato allo stesso modo, perché tutti riconosceranno che un attacco al caso sostanziale della proposizione è un attacco alla proposizione stessa.

src: When I was in prison I used to grip my fingers and think, ‘Right, do not do anything,’ trying to keep quiet.
mt: Cuando estaba en la cárcel, me agarraba los dedos y pensaba: “Bien, no hagas nada”, tratando de mantener la calma.

src: But Mrs McWhirter, accepting defeat, spent most of her time away, on the excuse that she was nursing her mother; and the daughter, if she felt like coming home, preferred to regard home as where her mother was.
mt: Ma la signora McWhirter, accettando la sconfitta, passò la maggior parte del tempo fuori, con la scusa che si prendeva cura di sua madre; e la figlia, se le andava di tornare a casa, preferiva considerare la casa come il luogo in cui si trovava sua madre.

src: 'Ere we are, crammed in tightly, when there's a couple of gents next door but one, with a first-class carriage for themselves.
mt: Aquí estamos, hacinados, cuando hay un par de caballeros al lado, pero uno, con un vagón de primera clase para ellos mismos.

src: You could tell they were enjoying themselves tremendously — and taking the piss, Lenny Kaye.
mt: Podías decir que se estaban divirtiendo tremendamente, y que se estaban burlando, Lenny Kaye.

src: Also in this study another pupil's comment was ‘ But in this school they see you're different from them — like you would wear glasses — and they will mock you. ’
mt: También en este estudio, otro alumno comentó: “Pero en esta escuela se ven que eres diferente a ellos, como si llevas gafas, y se burlan de ti”.

src: As the nondrinker I get first go (why?) and it is breathtaking.
mt: Como no bebedor, me toca a mí primero (¿por qué?) y es impresionante.

src: At the same time as they engage in this political maneuver, US policymakers (both Democrats and Republicans) demand that Vojislav Kostunica, President of Yugoslavia, cooperate with the Hague Tribunal unconditionally.
mt: Allo stesso tempo in cui si impegnano in questa manovra politica, i politici statunitensi (sia democratici che repubblicani) chiedono a Vojislav Kostunica, presidente della Jugoslavia, di cooperare incondizionatamente con il Tribunale dell'Aia.

src: Brussels is the future capital of Europe, it's centrally located in Europe and there isn't much competition.
mt: Bruxelles è la futura capitale dell'Europa, è situata al centro dell'Europa e non c'è molta concorrenza.

src: We knew the German signals for the night, so we tricked them into holding fire until we were about a mile out, then complete chaos erupted.
mt: Conocíamos las señales alemanas para la noche, así que les engañamos para que no dispararan hasta que estábamos a casi dos kilómetros de distancia, y entonces estalló el caos total.

src: But in my many private discussions with senior officials in Iran and elsewhere over the last few years, I have heard five such reasons stated with clarity and consistency, and they deserve to be taken seriously.
mt: Pero en mis muchas conversaciones privadas con altos funcionarios en Irán y en otros lugares en los últimos años, he escuchado cinco de estas razones expresadas con claridad y consistencia, y merecen ser tomadas en serio.

src: Rightly, few of the hypotheses examined in this book will endure but it will have achieved its aim if it provides a foothold for fellow students who also appreciate the need to abandon what may glibly be characterised as the ‘Beowulf and brooches’ approach.
mt: Giustamente, poche delle ipotesi esaminate in questo libro resisteranno, ma avrà raggiunto il suo scopo se fornirà un punto d’appoggio per i colleghi studenti che apprezzano anche la necessità di abbandonare ciò che può essere caratterizzato in modo superficiale come l’approccio “Beowulf e spille”.

src: Outside of the Square Mile, it's practically invisible in the UK rdbms market, where Oracle runs unchecked, Ingres still does well thanks to its ICL agreement into local and central government, and Informix, while selling like hot cakes, still mostly shifts its C-ISAM and Standard engines, not the high ticket OnLine.
mt: Fuera de la Square Mile, es prácticamente invisible en el mercado de rdbms del Reino Unido, donde Oracle funciona sin control, Ingres sigue teniendo éxito gracias a su acuerdo con ICL en el gobierno local y central, e Informix, aunque se vende como pan caliente, sigue cambiando principalmente sus motores C-ISAM y Standard, no el OnLine de alto precio.

src: Losing my job did not really affect my confidence.
mt: Perdere il mio lavoro non ha davvero influenzato la mia fiducia.

src: They all admire her too.
mt: Todos la admiran también.

src: Glen Hoddle, the man who abandoned Swindon Town, walked into this afternoon's transfer tribunal fearing his playing career was over.
mt: Glen Hoddle, el hombre que abandonó el Swindon Town, llegó al tribunal de transferencias de esta tarde temiendo que su carrera como jugador había terminado.

src: That means power and coal workers crippling the country once again.
mt: Eso significa que los trabajadores de la energía y el carbón paralizarán el país de nuevo.

src: Adultery makes Ray think carefully about things.
mt: El adulterio hace que Ray piense mucho sobre las cosas.

src: He insisted that it was an extra precautionary measure for tougher times ahead.
mt: Insistió en que era una medida de precaución adicional para los tiempos más duros que se avecinan.

src: Instead, here she was, creeping around her own house like a burglar, trying to avoid a man who annoyed her.
mt: En cambio, allí estaba ella, merodeando por su propia casa como una ladrona, tratando de evitar a un hombre que la molestaba.

src: Lengthy booklists are expensive and dull: with some time and effort it will be possible for you to build up a personal library and reference system which is individually geared to your particular needs, and one which helps you to build on your existing knowledge rather than attempting to begin again from the beginning.
mt: Le lunghe liste di libri sono costose e noiose: con un po' di tempo e fatica sarà possibile costruire una biblioteca personale e un sistema di riferimento che sia orientato alle proprie esigenze particolari, e che aiuti a costruire le proprie conoscenze esistenti piuttosto che tentare di ricominciare dall'inizio.

src: So, I suggest, he was tapping into what women wanted — adapting to the situation.
mt: Por lo tanto, sugiero que él estaba captando lo que las mujeres querían, adaptándose a la situación.

src: Germany has demonstrated that it is willing to take on responsibility for maintaining stability and order in the former Yugoslavia, and it will play an active role in supporting the Dayton peace agreements, both militarily and politically, including a share of the European Union's reconstruction assistance.
mt: La Germania ha dimostrato di essere disposta ad assumersi la responsabilità del mantenimento della stabilità e dell'ordine nell'ex Jugoslavia e svolgerà un ruolo attivo nel sostenere gli accordi di pace di Dayton, sia militarmente che politicamente, contribuendo anche con la propria parte all'assistenza alla ricostruzione dell'Unione europea.

src: It directly contradicts the commitments made at the Earth Summit to reduce consumption.
mt: È in contraddizione diretta con gli impegni assunti al Vertice della Terra per ridurre i consumi.

src: On a day when conditions were typical of what is expected at Barcelona in July, British Flying Dutchman crews proved they are no longer the also-rans of the Olympic team by finishing first, second, fourth and fifth off Hyeres yesterday.
mt: En un día en el que las condiciones eran típicas de lo que se espera en Barcelona en julio, los equipos británicos de Flying Dutchman demostraron que ya no son los últimos del equipo olímpico al terminar primero, segundo, cuarto y quinto en Hyeres ayer.

src: But he was confident enough to attempt gaining the upper hand on his inquisitor.
mt: Pero él tenía la confianza suficiente para intentar ganar la ventaja sobre su inquisidor.

src: My arrival ended her travels — at least for the first couple of years.
mt: Mi llegada puso fin a sus viajes, al menos durante los dos primeros años.

src: Yes, this is your area, Debbie, what's happening?
mt: Sí, esta es tu área, Debbie, ¿qué está pasando?

src: All we and they can do is to resist the degeneration of a justified action of international collective security into a United States'imperial ego-trip, to stop the affair from escalating further, and in doing so to prevent the UN, the only available base for world order, from falling into lasting discredit.
mt: Tutto ciò che noi e loro possiamo fare è resistere alla degenerazione di un'azione giustificata di sicurezza collettiva internazionale in un'esibizione di ego imperiale degli Stati Uniti, per fermare l'escalation dell'affare e, così facendo, impedire che l'ONU, l'unica base disponibile per l'ordine mondiale, cada in discredito duraturo.

src: But eventually selective breeding had a reversing effect on quality, and the economic boom that followed the First World War brought an explosion of demand for fur, for the first time a high-fashion commodity.
mt: Ma alla fine l’allevamento selettivo ha avuto un effetto negativo sulla qualità e il boom economico che ha seguito la Prima Guerra Mondiale ha portato ad un’esplosione della domanda di pellicce, per la prima volta una merce di alta moda.

src: However, a draft report by a secret ministerial advisory group reviewing ‘persistent unemployment’ suggests further measures to bring down the jobless tally could be under consideration.
mt: Sin embargo, un borrador de un informe de un grupo asesor ministerial secreto que revisa el "desempleo persistente" sugiere que se podrían estar considerando nuevas medidas para reducir el número de desempleados.

src: I'm telling you, Pat, we go out the back, into the garden and cut a swish from that bleeding forsythia bush, then come back in and give them a severe beating.
mt: Te lo digo, Pat, salimos por la puerta de atrás, entramos en el jardín y cortamos un ramo de ese arbusto de forsitia que está sangrando, luego volvemos y les damos una paliza.

src: If breakfast is a hasty meal then a bar counter is a good idea and a nice compromise between setting a proper table and snatching a cup of coffee on the wing.
mt: Se la colazione è un pasto veloce, allora un bancone da bar è una buona idea e un bel compromesso tra l'impostazione di una tavola adeguata e la possibilità di bere una tazza di caffè al volo.

src: Ultimately, the president was given an ultimatum.
mt: Finalmente, se le dio un ultimátum al presidente.

src: If fleeing and hiding have failed and the prey finds itself cornered by its would-be killer, it may make one last desperate attempt to save itself, by acting recklessly and attacking the predator physically.
mt: Si la huida y el escondite han fallado y la presa se encuentra acorralada por su posible asesino, puede hacer un último intento desesperado de salvarse, actuando de forma imprudente y atacando físicamente al depredador.

src: Tom undertakes a challenging task without prior experience.
mt: Tom si impegna in un'ardua impresa senza alcuna esperienza previa.

src: Their sparring for the position of least-favored son made me think.
mt: Su lucha por la posición de hijo menos favorecido me hizo pensar.

src: Blake suffered a severe setback.
mt: Blake sufrió un duro revés.

src: When the king was in session, nobles in attendance participated in the giving of judgements; brought and received gifts; joined royal feasts or fasts; heard royal speeches.
mt: Cuando el rey estaba en sesión, los nobles asistentes participaban en la emisión de juicios; traían y recibían regalos; se unían a fiestas o ayunos reales; escuchaban discursos reales.

src: The Forest Enterprise have a significant advantage as far as provision for off-road facilities is concerned.
mt: L'azienda forestale ha un vantaggio significativo per quanto riguarda la fornitura di strutture fuoristrada.

src: I was told that I would have to take a strange aircraft that night, I learnt that my aircraft had been damaged by flak — and Italian flak as well — and one of my lads was in hiding as he claimed I had threatened him with dire punishment if he damaged my aircraft.
mt: Mi fu detto che quella notte avrei dovuto prendere un aereo strano, e ho saputo che il mio velivolo era stato danneggiato da un colpo di fuoco - e anche da un colpo di fuoco italiano - e uno dei miei ragazzi si era nascosto perché sosteneva che l'avessi minacciato di una punizione terribile se avesse danneggiato il mio velivolo.

src: But the rolling series of scandals surrounding global megabanks makes it difficult for anyone to remain serious when executives insist that our largest banks must maintain their current scale and scope.
mt: Pero la serie de escándalos que rodean a los megabancos globales hace que sea difícil que alguien se mantenga serio cuando los ejecutivos insisten en que nuestros bancos más grandes deben mantener su escala y alcance actuales.

src: Chief coach Gordon Pritchard, forward coach Peter Souto and back coach Chris O'Brien all left the club — Pritchard offering his resignation after the game and Souto and O'Brien also resigning yesterday.
mt: El entrenador principal Gordon Pritchard, el entrenador de delanteros Peter Souto y el entrenador de defensas Chris O'Brien dejaron el club. Pritchard ofreció su renuncia después del partido y Souto y O'Brien también renunciaron ayer.

src: He had employed two extra assistants to prevent the flies from being a nuisance, and he found he had to force himself not to hurry his craft, not to cut corners.
mt: Había contratado a dos ayudantes más para evitar que las moscas fueran una molestia, y descubrió que tenía que obligarse a no apresurar su trabajo, ni a escatimar en detalles.

src: ‘ The queers are all publicly revealing their sexual orientation after last year's legislation, ’ Adam said.
mt: “Los gays están revelando públicamente su orientación sexual después de la legislación del año pasado”, dijo Adam.

src: In the beginning — and it had felt like the beginning although he was past thirty when they met — she had been an art student whose relationship with a young man on her course was coming to an end.
mt: Al principio (y le había parecido el principio, aunque él ya había pasado los treinta cuando se conocieron) ella había sido una estudiante de arte cuya relación con un joven de su curso estaba llegando a su fin.

src: In a sign that the rebound may be losing momentum, the Fed disclosed last night that the widely watched M2 measure of money supply, a barometer of economic activity, plummeted $7.1 billion in the week ending March.
mt: En una señal de que la recuperación podría estar perdiendo impulso, la Fed reveló anoche que la medida M2 de la oferta de dinero, un barómetro de la actividad económica, se desplomó en 7.100 millones de dólares en la semana que terminó en marzo.

src: In the rapidly changing European scene, Latin Europe can perhaps break the West-East dichotomy and start to establish links with non-European Spanish-speaking countries that share similar communication and cultural ties.

src: Erm, may I make a comment on neighbourhood watch, I went to a job the other day, it was a theatre, I was off duty and I got tapped on the shoulder by my local neighbourhood watch co-ordinator who said, nine months ago I resigned, I wrote a letter to headquarters, I wrote a letter to the divisional commander, and I wrote a letter to the local constable, and nobody's replied to me and they still keep sending me papers, are you going to sort yourselves out, now I have brought this up before, we never ever have let a neighbourhood watch scheme lapse, it's nothing to do with you, this is all before you came.

src: The mania for forming industry consortia is becoming so excessive that a group of leading manufacturers, software developers and vendors are coming together to make some sense of it and eliminate duplicated effort by creating a single consortium to which everyone will be invited to belong : there is no confirmation of suggestions that the idea was the first initiative from new IBM Corp chief Louis Gerstner, who accedes to the top job today, but we hear that the army of companies is still bogged down arguing about what to call the thing — the best they have dreamed up so far is the Consortium for Object-oriented Methods and Programming for the Unix Terminal and Enterprise-wide Recasting of Interactive Networked Database Undertakings with Software Transitioning and Revision for Y'all, but they can not find a snappy acronym to fit the words.
mt: La mania per la formazione di consorzi industriali sta diventando così eccessiva che un gruppo di produttori, sviluppatori di software e venditori di punta si stanno unendo per dare un senso a tutto questo ed eliminare gli sforzi duplicati creando un unico consorzio a cui tutti saranno invitati a far parte: non c'è conferma delle suggestioni che l'idea sia stata la prima iniziativa del nuovo capo della IBM Corp Louis Gerstner, che oggi accede al massimo incarico, ma sentiamo che l'esercito di aziende è ancora bloccato a discutere su come chiamare la cosa - il meglio che hanno sognato finora è il Consorzio per i metodi e la programmazione orientati agli oggetti per il terminale Unix e la rielaborazione a livello aziendale delle iniziative di database interattive in rete con la transizione e la revisione del software per tutti voi, ma non riescono a trovare un acronimo accattivante che si adatti alle parole.

src: While this beginning is effective in showing organisation, it delays addressing the main issue, and could be rewritten in the following way, which both demonstrates organisation less clumsily and begins the main discussion immediately: Since the terms "lyrical" and "epic" present special difficulties when used of Middle English works, it is useful to introduce discussion of works of the period with a brief analysis of these two terms.
mt: Anche se questo inizio è efficace nel mostrare l'organizzazione, ritarda l'affronto del problema principale e potrebbe essere riscritto nel modo seguente, che dimostra l'organizzazione in modo meno goffo e inizia immediatamente la discussione principale: poiché i termini "lirico" ed "epico" presentano particolari difficoltà quando vengono usati per le opere in inglese medio, è utile introdurre la discussione delle opere del periodo con una breve analisi di questi due termini.

src: Royal Insurance reduces its losses by two-thirds.
mt: Royal Insurance reduce sus pérdidas en dos tercios.

src: I think of all those using this channel : – people who gave generously, of their good money ; people who gave their physical strength ; people who gave limitless time ( even their annual leave from work ) ; people who managed a little time after work ; people who baked ; people who prayed ; the member who supplied the entire plant stall ; people who counted ; the little girl who devised an amusing quiz as her ‘ channel ’ ; people who served, and often withstood the cold winds of George Street ; people who used their artistic talents for communication ; people who lovingly restored the Church afterwards ; our engineer, who invented a ‘ chair-lift ’ for us, and then, literally, lent his physical support – and the bright spark who had fired him with the notion ; and finally and uniquely, the couple in Trinity, part of whose house is always given over to storing books so that this channel may be kept open.
mt: Penso a tutti coloro che hanno usato questo canale: persone che hanno dato generosamente i loro soldi; persone che hanno dato la loro forza fisica; persone che hanno dato tempo illimitato (anche le loro ferie annuali dal lavoro); persone che hanno gestito un po’ di tempo dopo il lavoro; persone che hanno cucinato; persone che hanno pregato; il membro che ha fornito l’intero banco dei fiori; persone che hanno contato; la bambina che ha ideato un quiz divertente come suo “canale”; persone che hanno servito e spesso hanno resistito ai venti freddi di George Street; persone che hanno usato i loro talenti artistici per comunicare; persone che hanno restaurato amorevolmente la Chiesa dopo; il nostro ingegnere, che ha inventato una “sedile-ascensore” per noi, e poi, letteralmente, ha prestato il suo supporto fisico – e la scintilla brillante che gli aveva dato l’idea; e infine e in modo univoco, la coppia di Trinity, parte della cui casa è sempre dedicata alla conservazione dei libri in modo che questo canale possa essere mantenuto aperto.

src: The only person that didn't was Fish, who had to maintain his dignity and went on claiming it was true.
mt: La única persona que no lo hizo fue Fish, que tenía que mantener su dignidad y siguió afirmando que era cierto.

src: so she said I, I went in and I said to Geraldine I'm going I owe you any bloody money take the bugger out me wages, she says I am not having people that I like being stabbed like that by people like that, she said she is not worth the salt of the earth, she's the salt of the earth she said with people like that pointing to Jenny and Jane, no way, she said and I'm going with my mates, I turned round and the next thing Janet and Janet and Barbara in there, when we got up the pub at twelve o'clock, course we were all having sandwiches me and Pam got the, me and er Barb got there, then Pam come in then a few more come and erm then the plumber and all that come in with them and I said oh girls we never recorded our exit, so I said oh well I'm going to have to take my key back to Steve, burst out laughing, so I said oh no I said why do not we have a key cracking competition so of course that's what we did we all took our keys out of our bag and we went ready for she's a jolly good ready, steady, fellow, for she's go and we cracked these ruddy keys and shoved them up in the air
mt: Así que ella dijo que yo, que entré y le dije a Geraldine que me iba, que le debía dinero, que se lo sacara de mi salario, y ella dijo que no iba a dejar que la gente que le gustaba fuera apuñalada así por gente así, dijo que no merecía la pena, que era la sal de la tierra, dijo, con gente así, señalando a Jenny y Jane, de ninguna manera, dijo, y me voy con mis compañeros, me di la vuelta y lo siguiente que pasó fue que Janet y Janet y Barbara estaban allí, cuando llegamos al pub a las doce, claro, todos estábamos comiendo sandwiches, yo y Pam, yo y Barb llegamos allí, luego Pam entró y luego llegaron unos cuantos más y, eh, el fontanero y todo eso llegó con ellos y dije, oh, chicas, nunca grabamos nuestra salida, así que dije, bueno, tendré que devolver la llave a Steve, y me echó a reír, así que dije, oh, no, dije, ¿por qué no hacemos una competición de romper llaves? Claro, eso fue lo que hicimos, todos sacamos las llaves de nuestros bolsos y fuimos listos, ella está lista, firme, compañero, porque ella va y rompimos estas llaves y las lanzamos al aire

src: The glamorous side of aviation, flying, has of course been brought to the attention of the public over the years ; but what of the ladies who drove staff cars, rode despatch motor cycles and undertook much arduous work often while being shot at?
mt: Il lato glamour dell'aviazione, il volo, ha ovviamente attirato l'attenzione del pubblico nel corso degli anni; ma che dire delle signore che guidavano le auto del personale, usavano motocicli per le consegne e svolgevano un lavoro molto arduo, spesso sotto tiro?

src: Ammonia loads, now less than half the 1970 level, are set to fall further too, thanks to the new £ 66 million sulphuric acid recovery plant, which will be in operation within the year.
mt: I carichi di ammoniaca, ora inferiori della metà rispetto al livello del 1970, sono destinati a diminuire ulteriormente, grazie al nuovo impianto di recupero di acido solforico da 66 milioni di sterline, che sarà operativo entro l’anno.

src: James Thorne's discussion of the long-standing debate over the interpretation of Robert Frost's poem, "Stopping by Woods," is instructive precisely because, among other things, it recognises the limitations of a stylistics that aims, or claims, to be objective and exhaustive, and because it highlights the need to be selective in description and open to the coexistence of multiple meanings in interpretation.
mt: La discusión de James Thorne sobre el prolongado debate sobre la interpretación del poema de Robert Frost, “Stopping by Woods”, es instructiva precisamente porque, entre otras cosas, reconoce las limitaciones de una estilística que apunta, o pretende ser, objetiva y exhaustiva, y porque destaca la necesidad de ser selectivo en la descripción y abierto a la coexistencia de múltiples significados en la interpretación.

src: I did all I could for that plant, but while my White Poplar in the garden continued to grow and flourish, sprouting new branches and hundreds of suckers that came up like a forest over all the lawn, the fern bought on that memorable day when the second deluge had fallen just faded away before my eyes.
mt: Hice todo lo que pude por esa planta, pero mientras mi álamo blanco en el jardín seguía creciendo y floreciendo, brotando nuevas ramas y cientos de retoños que surgían como un bosque sobre todo el césped, la helecha comprada en ese día memorable cuando había caído el segundo diluvio se desvaneció ante mis ojos.

src: I most certainly take exception to one or two hints around at the moment that our biggest problem is remaining calm.
mt: Sin duda, me opongo a uno o dos comentarios que se están haciendo en este momento de que nuestro mayor problema es mantener la calma.

src: The car, with everybody expressing their opinions simultaneously back in Maranello, was a weakish compromise.
mt: La vettura, con tutti che esprimono le loro opinioni contemporaneamente a Maranello, è stata un compromesso debole.

src: Learning to accept the fear that we all feel when in danger is different from being fearless.
mt: Imparare ad accettare la paura che tutti noi proviamo quando siamo in pericolo è diverso dall’essere senza paura.

src: this morning though, but feeling very confident.
mt: Esta mañana, sin embargo, me siento muy seguro.

src: In America, brokers acting as price stabilisers arrange what is known as a ‘ green shoe’— an agreement which allows them to go back and respectfully ask the issuing company for more new shares to cover their position.
mt: In America, i broker che agiscono come stabilizzatori dei prezzi organizzano una cosiddetta “green shoe”, un accordo che consente loro di tornare indietro e chiedere rispettosamente alla società emittente ulteriori nuove azioni per coprire la loro posizione.

src: The couple fell in love before they had even met in person during a six-month long distance courtship.
mt: La pareja se enamoró incluso antes de haberse conocido en persona, durante un noviazgo de seis meses a distancia.

src: Not the kind of character to openly express her emotions.
mt: No es el tipo de personaje que expresa abiertamente sus emociones.

src: Coopers believes there will be an exodus from Britain of multinational companies unwilling to pay for Labour's tax bill.
mt: Coopers cree que habrá un éxodo de empresas multinacionales de Gran Bretaña que no quieran pagar la factura fiscal del Partido Laborista.

src: And although many architects still find it hard to say Charles's name without sneering at the mention of it, most of them do admit that by bringing the whole subject into the public domain, architecture has had a much-needed shot in the arm.
mt: E sebbene molti architetti ancora trovano difficile pronunciare il nome di Charles senza fare cenno di disprezzo, la maggior parte di loro ammette che, portando l'intero argomento nel dominio pubblico, l'architettura ha ricevuto una spinta necessaria.

src: The Scottish Office has faced criticism for failing to increase capital spending on social work.
mt: La Oficina Escocesa ha recibido críticas por no aumentar el gasto de capital en trabajo social.

src: From a technical point of view this is mainly very closely matched stuff, but Microsoft is betting that the innovative use of existing technology will be a winner and is finally cashing in on all the application programming interfaces, dynamic data exchange, object linking and embedding facilities that it has been burying in its applications and operating systems for the last couple of years.
mt: Desde un punto de vista técnico, se trata principalmente de cosas muy parecidas, pero Microsoft está apostando a que el uso innovador de la tecnología existente será un éxito y finalmente está sacando partido a todas las interfaces de programación de aplicaciones, el intercambio dinámico de datos, las instalaciones de vinculación y enclavamiento de objetos que ha estado incorporando en sus aplicaciones y sistemas operativos durante los últimos años.

src: But by then the world knew that Diana loathed the sport — and suspected she had stopped loving Charles.
mt: Pero para entonces, el mundo sabía que Diana detestaba el deporte y sospechaba que había dejado de querer a Carlos.

src: We have a very exciting development that we are currently working on: a completely new look for Today's Horse.
mt: Abbiamo un progetto molto interessante a cui stiamo lavorando: un look completamente nuovo per Today's Horse.

src: Maybe I should have hung on for a few days in there to better understand Alf Bundy's ailments.
mt: Tal vez debería haberme quedado allí unos días para entender mejor las dolencias de Alf Bundy.

src: He had been in the ‘custody’ of psychiatric nurses but after his trial was adjourned for the day, he managed to escape from them.
mt: Él había estado bajo la “custodia” de enfermeras psiquiátricas, pero después de que su juicio se pospusiera por el día, logró escapar de ellas.

src: 9.1.3 undertakes that it will promptly disclose to the other Parties and to the Secretary of State any facts or circumstances which it discovers or becomes aware of indicating or suggesting any infringement or material risk of infringement of any patent or other Intellectual Property Right of any other person not being a Party to this Agreement through the expected mode of use or exploitation of its own results or background provided always that this undertaking shall not be deemed to impose or imply any specific obligation to undertake any patent searches of intellectual property rights or make any enquiries.
mt: 9.1.3 si impegna a comunicare tempestivamente alle altre parti e al Segretario di Stato qualsiasi fatto o circostanza di cui venga a conoscenza e che indichi o suggerisca una violazione o un rischio sostanziale di violazione di un brevetto o di un altro diritto di proprietà intellettuale di qualsiasi altra persona che non sia parte del presente accordo, attraverso la modalità di utilizzo o sfruttamento prevista dei propri risultati o conoscenze di base, fermo restando che tale impegno non deve essere considerato come l'imposizione o l'implicazione di un obbligo specifico di effettuare ricerche sui brevetti o sui diritti di proprietà intellettuale o di effettuare indagini.

src: Mona, who had her daughter Soraya and a nanny with her, also paid for expensive dinners at trendy restaurants.
mt: Mona, que tenía a su hija Soraya y a una niñera con ella, también pagó cenas caras en restaurantes de moda.

src: Academic fights back at politicians.
mt: Un académico se enfrenta a los políticos.

src: Someone from industry might be seen by employers as sharing a common understanding with them.
mt: I datori di lavoro potrebbero considerare una persona del settore come un interlocutore che condivide con loro una visione comune.

src: Unless you are fortunate enough to possess one of the new super-format camcorders in which these defects have been ironed out, the solution is to avoid such subjects.
mt: A meno che non siate fortunati abbastanza da possedere una delle nuove videocamere super-formato in cui questi difetti sono stati eliminati, la soluzione è quella di evitare tali soggetti.

src: They managed to ward off their lassitude with regular coffee breaks every hour and when lunch arrived unexpectedly just after midday, courtesy of Brummer, they were grateful for the nourishment and the respite.
mt: Conseguían evitar la fatiga con descansos regulares para el café cada hora y cuando llegó el almuerzo inesperadamente justo después del mediodía, cortesía de Brummer, estaban agradecidos por la comida y el descanso.

src: Once upon a time you used to have a five year planning period, and that has now disappeared, so we operate without long-term financial security, and the Finance Officer manages marvellously in juggling things round, but one can no longer plan as one used to, and therefore it's rather sad really, because people no longer have the chance to develop things as they would wish to.
mt: Un tempo si aveva un periodo di programmazione di cinque anni, che ora è scomparso, quindi operiamo senza una sicurezza finanziaria a lungo termine, e il responsabile finanziario gestisce meravigliosamente destreggiandosi tra le cose, ma non si può più pianificare come si faceva prima, e quindi è davvero triste, perché le persone non hanno più la possibilità di sviluppare le cose come vorrebbero.

src: The Glebe School pupil is very fond of dogs and PC John Baines, who is involved with the ward's charity that grants wishes, arranged for her to spend the day with members of the police dog section.
mt: La alumna de la escuela de Glebe es muy aficionada a los perros y el agente John Baines, que participa en la obra de caridad del distrito que concede deseos, le organizó a ella pasar el día con miembros de la sección de perros de policía.

src: They came with a good suit on and they would go to work with a suit double breasted and then and they would work there and make a lot of money and when the next thing they would do they would come into town and get all rigged out and then that was them from top to bottom from their hat right to their feet and then they would set out on their journey.
mt: Llevaban un buen traje y se iban a trabajar con un traje de dos botones y luego trabajaban allí y ganaban mucho dinero y lo siguiente que hacían era ir a la ciudad y arreglarse todo y así era de arriba abajo, desde el sombrero hasta los pies y luego se iban de viaje.

src: Rod, working on his own life story with a ghost writer, has promised: ‘I am going to examine every detail — I intend to delve deeply into the numerous stains I have left on the tapestry of life.’
mt: Rod, que está trabajando en su propia historia de vida con un escritor fantasma, prometió: “Voy a examinar cada detalle, tengo la intención de profundizar en las numerosas manchas que he dejado en el tapiz de la vida”.

src: As might be expected, the move has provoked a strong reaction of academic fear and loathing against USL and has created a cadre of naive tech weenies ready to form a lynch mob.
mt: Como era de esperar, el movimiento ha provocado una fuerte reacción de miedo y aversión académica contra USL y ha creado un grupo de ingenuos fanáticos de la tecnología listos para formar una turba linchadora.

src: After two years of bingeing up Baldwin and bringing Neville along to find that even Neville fails in the first fortnight of serious crisis.
mt: Después de dos años de devorar a Baldwin y llevar a Neville conmigo para descubrir que incluso Neville falla en las primeras dos semanas de una crisis grave.

src: I wondered if he thought Dana and I were about to get married, or whether he was thinking of us individually — the latter, I think, because he had warned me against marriage once or twice before when I had shown what he regarded as too much interest in a woman friend.
mt: Me preguntaba si él pensaba que Dana y yo íbamos a casarnos, o si pensaba en nosotros individualmente (creo que lo segundo, porque él ya me había advertido una o dos veces sobre el matrimonio cuando había mostrado lo que él consideraba un interés excesivo por una amiga.

src: The French Algerian and Congo wars were raging ; performance art did not yet exist but she incorporated tear gas for the grand finale of her shooting performances.
mt: Las guerras francesas en Argelia y el Congo estaban en pleno apogeo; el arte interpretativo aún no existía, pero ella incorporó gas lacrimógeno para el gran final de sus actuaciones de disparos.

src: I knew it seemed familiar somewhere.
mt: Sabía que me parecía familiar de algún lugar.
