mt: Esta colección abarca una amplia gama de textos no simplificados que van desde Shakespeare, Ben Jonson y Dickens hasta Roger McGough, Muriel Spark y John Steinbeck.

src: Oh, she should have paid more attention to him when they lay close; she should have absorbed the hollows and smoothness of his brow and committed him to memory.
mt: Oh, ella debería haberle prestado más atención cuando estaban juntos; debería haber absorbido las hendiduras y la suavidad de su frente y haberlo grabado en su memoria.

src: You tell her you had nowhere comfortable to sleep?
mt: ¿Le dijiste que no tenías un lugar cómodo para dormir?

mt: Pero si estás preparado para tener un poco de paciencia hasta esa última valla, tengo la sensación de que puedes terminar por delante del resto del campo.

src: Well, I think it's quite hard to talk about it, but certainly I think people were grieved that the bonus system that had been going since the quarry was started up again by his father was going to be scrapped with really no consultation with the workers, if you like, and I think everybody thought that, you know, we'd been producing a lot of slate and been paid well for it previously and he should not interfere with it.
mt: Bueno, creo que es bastante difícil hablar de ello, pero, sin duda, creo que la gente estaba triste porque el sistema de bonificaciones que se había estado aplicando desde que su padre volvió a poner en marcha la cantera iba a ser eliminado sin consultar a los trabajadores, si se quiere, y creo que todo el mundo pensaba que, ya sabes, habíamos producido mucha pizarra y habíamos sido bien pagados por ello anteriormente y que él no debería interferir en ello.

src: There had been suggestions that directors had acted too soon by putting a figure to the fraud before Coopers had completed its report.
mt: Si era pensato che i dirigenti avessero agito troppo in fretta, mettendo una cifra sul valore della frode prima che Coopers avesse completato il suo rapporto.

src: In banking, the trust-busters emerged victorious with the Glass-Steagall Act of 1933, which divorced commercial banking from investment banking and guaranteed bank deposits.
mt: En el sector bancario, los antimonopolistas salieron victoriosos con la Ley Glass-Steagall de 1933, que separó la banca comercial de la banca de inversión y garantizó los depósitos bancarios.

src: The subject under discussion is that old chestnut, public or private financing of the arts, but there is a particularly exciting line-up of speakers to ruminate on.
mt: L’argomento in discussione è la vecchia storia del finanziamento pubblico o privato delle arti, ma c’è una lista di relatori particolarmente interessante su cui riflettere.

src: The woman's eyes widened as she took it, but at the first taste she thrust it at Juliet, making a disgusted expression.
mt: Los ojos de la mujer se agrandaron cuando lo tomó, pero a la primera bocada se lo lanzó a Juliet, haciendo una expresión de disgusto.

src: However, financial uncertainty, a low priority attached until recently to rural schemes by the Housing Corporation and problems associated with its national-scale administration, coupled with some rural planning restrictions, have meant that only a very small number of the schemes of this and other organizations have been successfully completed.
mt: Sin embargo, la incertidumbre financiera, la baja prioridad que hasta hace poco tiempo se daba a los proyectos rurales por parte de la Housing Corporation y los problemas asociados a su administración a escala nacional, junto con algunas restricciones de planificación rural, han hecho que solo un número muy reducido de los proyectos de esta y otras organizaciones se hayan completado con éxito.

src: Earlier this month the sides played a draw in Limerick, the big Ballycastle clubman was the standout performer with a virtuoso display in the middle of the field.
mt: A principios de mes, los dos equipos empataron en Limerick, y el gran jugador del Ballycastle fue el mejor del partido con una actuación virtuosa en el medio campo.

src: But Mortimer said that if it had been him he would have become extremely angry.
mt: Pero Mortimer dijo que si hubiera sido él, se habría enfadado muchísimo.

mt: Incluía más de 40 townlands a ambos lados del Bann y, a pesar de sus formas poco familiares, algunos de los nombres pueden parecer conocidos: Knocknamocally, Ballynonaghie, Ballyvickranell, Edenidery, Taunagh, Mehain, Clonagh, Ballygaragan, Carricke, Garravaghy y Dromnasough.

mt: Pam ama a los niños, pero no les gusta cuando se mueven, le molesta.

mt: “18 meses de trabajo desperdiciados”, dijo.

mt: Non è abbastanza per i “manager” essere inviati con istruzioni, memorizzate nella loro testa, per avere conversazioni amichevoli con i migliori e i più brillanti, dicendo loro che ora la loro promozione è davvero la capacità di mantenere i loro posti di lavoro.

src: Tolby seemed to have ingratiated himself with all the Devenishes for what he could get: the father took him into the firm and launched him on his career; Clare darned his socks and cooked him meals; and Hubert — if Henry was right — had put some business his way.
mt: Tolby parecía haberse ganado el favor de todos los Devenishes por todo lo que pudo conseguir: el padre lo llevó a la empresa y lo puso en marcha en su carrera; Clare le remendaba los calcetines y le cocinaba las comidas; y Hubert, si Henry estaba en lo cierto, le había dado algunos negocios.

src: But if her snarling face in the mirror is any indication, Snow White's the one who should be very afraid.
mt: Pero si su cara gruñona en el espejo es una indicación, Blancanieves es la que debería tener mucho miedo.

src: At the same time the tables would be turned so that they could actually be used to help finance the project, along with the Right-On councils which had already ignored financial restraint.
mt: Al mismo tiempo, se daría la vuelta a las tablas para que realmente se pudieran utilizar para ayudar a financiar el proyecto, junto con los consejos de Right-On que ya habían ignorado la restricción financiera.

src: The function of the court in such circumstances is to establish an equilibrium between the conflicting considerations of not preventing redevelopment on the one hand, and giving the tenant a reasonable degree of security of tenure on the other.
mt: La funzione del tribunale in tali circostanze è quella di stabilire un equilibrio tra le considerazioni contrastanti di non impedire la riqualificazione da un lato e di dare al locatario un ragionevole grado di sicurezza di permanenza dall'altro.

src: But she had only been there four months when she was targeted by supervisor Brian McConville who subjected her to a harrowing sexual harassment ordeal.
mt: Pero ella solo había estado allí cuatro meses cuando fue atacada por el supervisor Brian McConville, que la sometió a una penosa prueba de acoso sexual.

src: Ultimately, it is the person that makes the impact.
mt: In definitiva, è la persona che fa la differenza.

src: I like this girl, because she's Welsh, just, I can't do her accent, but she kept saying it several times, he was getting really annoyed with her.
mt: Me gusta esta chica, porque es galesa, es que no puedo hacer su acento, pero ella seguía repitiéndolo varias veces, él se estaba poniendo realmente molesto con ella.

mt: Mientras tanto, los jugadores de fútbol de Inglaterra, conmocionados, se enfrentaron a más críticas ayer por insultar al héroe de la portería americana Tony Meola durante la derrota de 2-0 en Boston.

src: In contrast, the few children who maintained contact with a birth parent or members of the birth family seemed to draw a lot of satisfaction from occasional communications or meetings.
mt: Al contrario, i pochi bambini che hanno mantenuto i contatti con un genitore o con membri della famiglia di nascita sembravano trarre grande soddisfazione dalle comunicazioni o dagli incontri occasionali.

src: SIR — Just what thought-processes are assumed to make the floating voter more inclined to support party leaders whom he has seen flanked by what the newspapers call ‘ glitterati ’ — celebrities, that is, of stage, screen, pop concerts, running, jumping and participating in sports?
mt: SIR — ¿Qué procesos de pensamiento se supone que hacen que el votante indeciso esté más inclinado a apoyar a los líderes de los partidos a los que ha visto flanqueados por lo que los periódicos llaman “glitterati”, es decir, celebridades del escenario, la pantalla, los conciertos de pop, la carrera, el salto y la participación en deportes?

src: And an equal amount to the horse himself who had every excuse to stop at the start, along with most of his comrades.
mt: Y la misma cantidad para el propio caballo, que tenía todas las excusas para detenerse al principio, junto con la mayoría de sus compañeros.

src: They track every piece of hardware we got up there … just as we monitor theirs.
mt: Rastrean cada pieza de hardware que tenemos allí... igual que nosotros monitorizamos el de ellos.

src: Since Darlington Health Authority's operational policy document was first drafted and given to committee members last year, the situation has changed, and Our wonderful new unit, which thousands of local people have worked so hard to raise money for, seems doomed to become a white elephant, admitting day patients only.
mt: Desde que se redactó el documento de política operativa de la Autoridad Sanitaria de Darlington y se entregó a los miembros del comité el año pasado, la situación ha cambiado y nuestra maravillosa nueva unidad, para la que miles de personas de la localidad trabajaron tan duro para recaudar dinero, parece condenada a convertirse en un elefante blanco, que solo admite pacientes de día.

src: I've got a lot I'm preoccupied with: the state of the economy, interest rates, disarmament in the Warsaw Pact, lead in petrol, why nobody lets England win at cricket any more, does the Aids scare mean we'll never have another vampire movie, are forty-eight satellite TV channels enough…
mt: Tengo muchas cosas que me preocupan: el estado de la economía, los tipos de interés, el desarme en el Pacto de Varsovia, el plomo en la gasolina, por qué nadie deja que Inglaterra gane más en el críquet, si el miedo al sida significa que nunca tendremos otra película de vampiros, si cuarenta y ocho canales de televisión por satélite son suficientes...

src: 'And I think that someone would like to dance it with me,'she said, as Herman, lured by the smile, came across and with a ludicrous bow, asked Erika if she would have the pleasure of dancing with him, Erika graciously accepting, to her delight leaving Fritz looking disconsolate and unhappy.
mt: “Y creo que alguien querría bailarla conmigo”, dijo, mientras Herman, atraído por la sonrisa, se acercó y, con una ridícula reverencia, le preguntó a Erika si tendría el placer de bailar con él, Erika aceptó amablemente, dejándolo a Fritz desconsolado y triste.

src: Did Gibson find a similar lump in his throat when the time came to get married?
mt: ¿Gibson encontró un bulto parecido en su garganta cuando llegó el momento de casarse?

src: Capitalizing on the popularity of Expo 92 doesn't come cheap.
mt: Sacar partido a la popularidad de la Expo 92 no es barato.

src: Oh, nothing is worse than to pursue a lost cause.
mt: Oh, no hay nada peor que perseguir una causa perdida.

src: I look forward to watching Rainbow attempt to feign devotion in hopes of winning the fair lady.
mt: Espero con ansias ver el intento de Rainbow de fingir devoción con la esperanza de ganarse a la dama.

src: Contract Hire is rare in aviation circles, but becoming more popular rapidly for motor cars.
mt: Il contratto di noleggio è raro nel mondo dell'aviazione, ma sta diventando rapidamente più popolare per le auto.

src: They studied referees' reports and may recommend canceling it again after the final at Wembley on March 27.
mt: Estudiaron los informes de los árbitros y pueden recomendar que se cancele de nuevo después de la final en Wembley el 27 de marzo.

src: And look at the way he's thought about it overnight, oh I'm not running, Tim, I cannot cope this morning, I know sometimes we do, but I need to walk to the gate like a lady.
mt: Y mira la forma en que lo ha pensado durante la noche, oh, no voy a correr, Tim, no puedo hacer frente a esto esta mañana, sé que a veces lo hacemos, pero necesito caminar hasta la puerta como una señora.

src: I hope that, if they ask me, they will let me take in alphabetical chunks at a time, as the whole thing weighs about a stone!!!
mt: Spero che, se me lo chiedono, mi lasceranno prenderlo in porzioni alfabetiche alla volta, dato che il tutto pesa circa una pietra!!!

src: Perhaps some drunken jape which became unmanageable, or perhaps a calculated act of attempted murder.
mt: Tal vez fue una broma de borrachos que se salió de control, o quizás un intento de asesinato premeditado.

src: Falling in love, stopping loving, being jealous, hating somebody.
mt: Innamorarsi, smettere di amare, essere gelosi, odiare qualcuno.

src: That staved off hardship for a little while, I think.
mt: Eso evitó las dificultades por un tiempo, creo.

src: Anything less than this is a measure of the extent to which the research does not meet scientific standards.
mt: Qualunque cosa inferiore a questo è una misura della misura in cui la ricerca non soddisfa gli standard scientifici.

src: Exclusive possession as a concept for identifying tenancies does not drive a coach and horses through the Rent Acts but rather approaches things in the wrong order: a phrase used to describe the collective rights of the tenant is inappropriate as a test of whether a tenancy has in fact been created.
mt: Il possesso esclusivo come concetto per identificare i contratti di locazione non è un concetto centrale nella normativa sugli affitti, ma piuttosto un approccio che non tiene conto dell’ordine corretto: una frase utilizzata per descrivere i diritti collettivi del locatario non è appropriata come prova del fatto che un contratto di locazione sia stato effettivamente stipulato.

src: Something about the words that I use, and the way that I deliver them, something about it evokes a strong negative feeling in him.
mt: Qualcosa nelle parole che uso, e nel modo in cui le pronuncio, qualcosa in questo evoca in lui una forte sensazione negativa.

src: The only time I took off was the last week of June and the first week in July to watch Wimbledon — yes, we finally bought a TV, and a coloured one in addition, which seemed the height of posh.
mt: La única vez que me tomé vacaciones fue la última semana de junio y la primera semana de julio para ver Wimbledon. Sí, finalmente compramos un televisor, y uno a color, además, lo que parecía la máxima expresión de la elegancia.

src: Consider carefully before you employ members of your own family and never assume that anyone will pay their debts.
mt: Pensez bien avant d'employer des membres de votre famille et ne pensez jamais que quelqu'un paiera ses dettes.

src: Inside, Keith was sitting at the bar, drinking and waving a £5 note at the landlady.
mt: En el interior, Keith estaba sentado en la barra, bebiendo y agitando un billete de 5 £ ante la casera.

src: First, it is clear that putting the National Union of Public Employees, the National and Local Government Officers Association and the Confederation of Health Service Employees back in control will never solve the problem.
mt: En primer lugar, está claro que poner de nuevo bajo control a la Unión Nacional de Empleados Públicos, la Asociación Nacional y Local de Funcionarios y la Confederación de Empleados del Servicio de Salud nunca resolverá el problema.

src: As a PC depreciates faster than a catwalk model who's just turned 30, here are my tips for those of you who do not want to suffer significant financial losses.
mt: Dato che un PC si deprezza più velocemente di una modella di passerella che ha appena compiuto 30 anni, ecco i miei consigli per coloro che non vogliono subire perdite finanziarie significative.

src: Pete had sacrificed him to preserve his own life at any cost, holding up his fat family as some kind of excuse.
mt: Pete lo había sacrificado para preservar su propia vida a cualquier precio, usando a su familia gorda como excusa.

src: His dirty-intentioned words had a strong impact.
mt: Sus palabras con malas intenciones tuvieron un fuerte impacto.

src: Public NME strongly disapproves of types who persecute innocent human beings who just happen to enjoy the feel of women's lingerie against their bollocks, but did find it quite funny that the be-wigged ‘bomb victims’ were so convinced it was an aerial attack they raced into a nearby hotel to beat up a perfectly innocent couple snogging on a balcony.
mt: Public NME desaprueba totalmente a los tipos que persiguen a seres humanos inocentes que simplemente disfrutan de la sensación de la ropa interior de las mujeres contra sus bolas, pero sí nos pareció bastante divertido que las “víctimas de la bomba” con pelucas estuvieran tan convencidas de que se trataba de un ataque aéreo que corrieron a un hotel cercano para golpear a una pareja perfectamente inocente que se besaba en un balcón.

src: In the final article in our series, Richard Holloway reflects on conclusions that can be reached on modern society from the attitudes and opinions revealed in the course of the week, campaigning for a noble cause.
mt: Nell'ultimo articolo della nostra serie, Richard Holloway riflette sulle conclusioni che possono essere raggiunte sulla società moderna dagli atteggiamenti e dalle opinioni rivelate nel corso della settimana, facendo campagna per una nobile causa.

src: Slopers, smearing and associated delicate manoeuvres allow absorbing progress to be made, while the unexpectedly good protection completes the final perk.
mt: I passaggi a strapiombo, gli smear e le delicate manovre che li accompagnano permettono di compiere progressi notevoli, mentre la protezione, inaspettatamente buona, completa il pacchetto finale.

src: Their reflections, gliding above these sumptuous displays, showed a shabby pair, distinctly poorly dressed and worn out, as sharply contrasted as the proletarian flotsam in some Victorian street scene, dingy spectators of the nobs in their satin and feathers.
mt: Le loro riflessioni, scivolando sopra questi sontuosi display, mostravano una coppia malconcia, vestita in modo decisamente scadente e logora, in netto contrasto con i rifiuti proletari in alcune scene di strada vittoriane, spettatori squallidi dei notabili nei loro abiti di raso e piume.

src: GUIL : We're still getting settled.
mt: GUIL: Todavía estamos instalándonos.

src: ‘When they have had their drink and polished off those breakfast dishes, Mrs Salt says to help me.’
mt: “Cuando hayan terminado de beber y de limpiar los platos del desayuno, la Sra. Salt me dice que la ayude”.

src: Aunt Tossie's dressing-table was a picture of proper arrangement, quite unlike her tumbled bed, or the pink satin corset that was carelessly tangled with the long slit drawers thrown together on a tapestry chair — a chair covered in great beaded roses, laughing at the fun, over one arm black lace stockings trailed negligent as if there was no tomorrow.
mt: El tocador de la tía Tossie era un ejemplo de orden, muy diferente a su desordenado lecho, o al corsé de satén rosa que estaba descuidadamente enredado con los largos cajones de ranura que estaban juntos en una silla de tapicería, una silla cubierta de grandes rosas de cuentas, riendo por la diversión, con medias de encaje negro colgando negligentemente por un brazo como si no hubiera un mañana.

src: Ultimately, the true cost of allowing insider dealing is less important than what people think the true cost to be.
mt: In definitiva, il vero costo della possibilità di insider trading è meno importante di quello che le persone pensano che sia.

src: And sadly, Olympic rowers are not the only ones struggling financially… on the eve of a new international rugby season Gloucester's World Cup hero Mike Teague is seeking compensation from the sport's governing body Iron man Mike claims the shoulder injury he suffered while playing for England has stopped him from working as a builder and he's lost between three and five thousand pounds in earnings.
mt: Y, lamentablemente, los remeros olímpicos no son los únicos que luchan financieramente… en vísperas de una nueva temporada internacional de rugby, el héroe de la Copa Mundial de Gloucester, Mike Teague, está buscando una compensación por parte del organismo rector del deporte. El hombre de hierro Mike afirma que la lesión en el hombro que sufrió mientras jugaba para Inglaterra le ha impedido trabajar como constructor y ha perdido entre tres y cinco mil libras en ganancias.

src: Now that I think about it, that bloody M.O.
mt: Ahora que lo pienso, ese modus operandi sangriento

src: Five worlds split into several sections is certainly enough to keep you up late studying.
mt: Cinque mondi suddivisi in diverse sezioni sono certamente sufficienti per farvi studiare fino a tardi.

src: Ritchie admitted that the offending officer annoyed him too, and begged me to reconsider and to allow him to intervene.
mt: Ritchie admitió que el oficial que había cometido la ofensa también lo había molestado y me rogó que reconsiderara y que le permitiera intervenir.

src: With £400 to the first man home and £300 to the first lady and considerable training grants throughout, Lisburn looks sure to be successful once again.
mt: Con 400 £ para el primer hombre que llegue a casa y 300 £ para la primera mujer y unas ayudas considerables para el entrenamiento, Lisburn parece seguro de tener éxito de nuevo.

src: But they will, instead, cooperate to move an innovation ahead.
mt: Pero, en cambio, cooperarán para impulsar una innovación.

src: Ending the relationship with your partner may not be the answer to midlife change and you may not want a divorce, but you are likely to find that you need to update your relationship if the marriage is to be sound and mutually satisfying for another twenty or thirty years.
mt: Terminare la relazione con il tuo partner potrebbe non essere la risposta al cambiamento di mezza età e potresti non volere il divorzio, ma è probabile che tu possa scoprire di dover aggiornare la tua relazione se il matrimonio deve essere solido e reciprocamente soddisfacente per altri vent'anni o trent'anni.

src: Married off and with a couple of babies in addition.
mt: Casada y con un par de bebés además.

src: Apparently, one might say that an upstanding, law-abiding trade should have nothing to fear where this is concerned; they should simply not deal in masterpieces without a provenance.
mt: A quanto pare, si potrebbe dire che un commercio onesto e rispettoso della legge non dovrebbe avere nulla da temere in questo caso; dovrebbero semplicemente astenersi dal trattare capolavori senza una provenienza.

src: Hands grasped the now frightened convener as his mates fought to prevent the pressing mob from getting too close.
mt: Las manos agarraron al ahora asustado organizador mientras sus compañeros luchaban para evitar que la multitud presionante se acercara demasiado.

src: Stirling was taking a huge risk.
mt: Stirling estaba corriendo un gran riesgo.

src: The shops took on a new lease of life, the street-sellers, with their lemonade and nougat, ostrich feathers, mummy-beads and scarabs, carnations and roses, and the street-artists, with their boa-constrictors and baboons, regained their enthusiasm, and the city in general resumed its normal manic rhythm.
mt: Las tiendas cobraron nueva vida, los vendedores ambulantes, con su limonada y turrón, plumas de avestruz, cuentas de momias y escarabajos, claveles y rosas, y los artistas callejeros, con sus boas constrictoras y babuinos, recuperaron su entusiasmo, y la ciudad en general reanudó su ritmo maníaco habitual.

src: The employer was forced to admit that no replacement had been engaged, which tended to indicate that a redundancy might have been a possibility.
mt: Il datore di lavoro è stato costretto ad ammettere che non era stato assunto alcun sostituto, il che tende a indicare che un licenziamento potrebbe essere stato una possibilità.

src: Nicky, of Falkirk, West Lothian, said: ‘It was making the situation even more upsetting to see Des's face on the record cover smiling up at me.’
mt: Nicky, de Falkirk, West Lothian, dijo: “La situación era aún más perturbadora al ver la cara de Des en la portada del disco sonriendo hacia mí”.

src: If Labour Members are so keen on Ravenscraig staying open, why does the hon. Member for Dunfermline, East (Mr. Brown) not have the courage — or perhaps the influence in the shadow Cabinet — to give an unequivocal commitment that if the Labour party came to power it would keep Ravenscraig open?
mt: Si los miembros del Partido Laborista están tan interesados en que Ravenscraig siga abierto, ¿por qué el Miembro por Dunfermline, East (Sr. Brown) no tiene el coraje —o quizás la influencia en el Gabinete de la Oposición— de dar un compromiso inequívoco de que si el Partido Laborista llegara al poder, mantendría Ravenscraig abierto?

src: There were a lot of reputations at stake, particularly at the Serious Fraud Office and prosecution counsel, and they used every possible means to prosecute us until something stuck.
mt: C'erano molte reputazioni in gioco, in particolare presso l'Ufficio per le frodi gravi e i procuratori, e hanno usato ogni mezzo possibile per perseguirci fino a quando qualcosa ha funzionato.

src: The couple were treated to a luxurious evening of food and drink before retiring to a plush suite for Valentine's night.
mt: La pareja disfrutó de una lujosa cena y bebida antes de retirarse a una lujosa suite para la noche de San Valentín.

src: And it alarmed her, to put it mildly.
mt: Y eso la alarmó, por decirlo suavemente.

src: We do accuse the Liberal Democrats of jumping on the bandwagon at a late stage, but in this they are acting consistently with their typical behavior and they are confusing the issue by doing their own irrelevant thing.
mt: Acusamos a los demócratas liberales de subirse al carro en una etapa tardía, pero en este caso están actuando de forma consistente con su comportamiento típico y están confundiendo el tema al hacer su propia cosa irrelevante.

src: This is a worthwhile approach, though one should be aware that different mutagens give qualitatively different kinds of mutation.
mt: Questo è un approccio valido, anche se bisogna essere consapevoli del fatto che diversi mutageni producono tipi di mutazioni qualitativamente diversi.

src: They say an Ulsterman speaks plainly and knows the value of one.
mt: Dicen que un hombre de Ulster habla claro y sabe el valor de una palabra.

src: Although clearly at odds with the'socialist' economy, all this is a relatively insignificant amount compared with a far more serious problem — nietroudovyie dokhody — or 'unearned income' — as it is euphemistically called.
mt: Anche se chiaramente in contrasto con l'economia "socialista", tutto ciò è una somma relativamente insignificante rispetto a un problema molto più serio: i nietroudovyie dokhody, o "redditi non guadagnati", come vengono eufemisticamente chiamati.

src: Birbeck believed that Branson had tricked them as ‘revenge’ for a Music Week reporter feeding stories disparaging Branson to the satirical magazine Private Eye — and he was partly right.
mt: Birbeck creía que Branson los había engañado como “venganza” por un reportero de Music Week que daba historias menospreciando a Branson a la revista satírica Private Eye, y él tenía parcialmente razón.

src: I spent the rest of the evening with my relatives gathered closely around me, hoping nobody would notice the idiot in the middle with two completely different shoes.
mt: Pasé el resto de la tarde con mis familiares reunidos a mi alrededor, esperando que nadie se diera cuenta del idiota en el medio con dos zapatos completamente diferentes.

src: A complex system with many intricate mechanisms…
mt: Un sistema complesso con molti meccanismi intricati…

src: The chancellor answered by retaliating with equal force.
mt: La canciller respondió con una represalia de igual fuerza.

src: Then the firm is given one year to succeed.
mt: A la empresa se le da un año para tener éxito.

src: Marche is for the traveller who wants to turn off the tourist trail, to avoid the show places, and get to know the green heartland of Italy, the not so self-conscious Italy.
mt: Le Marche sono per il viaggiatore che vuole uscire dai sentieri turistici, evitare i luoghi più affollati e conoscere il cuore verde d'Italia, l'Italia meno presuntuosa.

src: A signal occasion … the steam train reverting to a bygone era.
mt: Un'occasione speciale... il treno a vapore che riporta a un'epoca passata.

src: Mary organized the plates and watched his carving.
mt: Mary organizó los platos y observó cómo cortaba.

src: ROY KEANE 'S British record transfer to Blackburn Rovers was still pending last night as the Republic of Ireland midfielder decided to delay the announcement of his new club until after tomorrow's World Cup qualifier against Lithuania in Vilnius.
mt: La transferencia de ROY KEANE al Blackburn Rovers, un récord en Gran Bretaña, aún estaba pendiente anoche, ya que el mediocampista de la República de Irlanda decidió posponer el anuncio de su nuevo club hasta después del partido de clasificación para la Copa Mundial de mañana contra Lituania en Vilnius.

src: But things have reached a stage where if a song is not real predictable radio fare then it's regarded as left-field.
mt: Pero las cosas han llegado a un punto en el que si una canción no es realmente predecible para la radio, se considera que está fuera de lugar.

src: Cautiously opting for the latter view, Larry manipulates the laws of astrophysics to construct a theory of subjectivity through the metaphoric lens of the uncertainty principle :
mt: Scegliendo cautamente la seconda visione, Larry manipola le leggi dell'astrofisica per costruire una teoria della soggettività attraverso la lente metaforica del principio di indeterminazione:

src: In two test cases the Law Lords decided that house-buyers — at least at the cheap end of the market — were entitled to damages against valuers who failed to exercise reasonable skill and care — nor could this liability be excluded by a fine-print disclaimer.
mt: In due casi di prova i Law Lords hanno deciso che gli acquirenti di case — almeno a livello di fascia bassa del mercato — avevano diritto a un risarcimento danni nei confronti dei periti che non avessero esercitato la dovuta diligenza e cura — e tale responsabilità non poteva essere esclusa da una clausola di esclusione in piccolo.

src: Hope Steuart had leaned two loaded muskets against the doorjambs ; he turned to pick one up but the Duke's two sons were on him, holding him.
mt: Hope Steuart había apoyado dos mosquetes cargados contra los marcos de las puertas; él se volvió para coger uno, pero los dos hijos del duque estaban encima de él, sujetándolo.

src: The producer, a blase young woman, toyed with a lettuce leaf and an olive, but on the rare occasions I am invited to lunch I generally do without breakfast, so I made up for her and discussed the shooting schedule ( you soon pick up the jargon ) with the director.
mt: La productora, una joven desgastada, jugaba con una hoja de lechuga y una aceituna, pero en las raras ocasiones en que me invitan a almorzar, generalmente no he desayunado, así que me la inventé y discutí el programa de rodaje (uno pronto aprende la jerga) con el director.

src: Oh, Jesus, she's extremely annoying us.
mt: Oh, Jesús, nos está molestando muchísimo.

src: He said the combination of bars in the Beaumont Street area of Darlington would eliminate the profits of similar areas in the town.
mt: Dijo que la combinación de bares en la zona de Beaumont Street de Darlington eliminaría las ganancias de áreas similares en la ciudad.

src: Did I look so obviously the sort to get into trouble that I couldn't go about with circles under my eyes, or telephone a doctor, or throw up occasionally, without everyone immediately jumping to a single conclusion?
mt: Sembravo davvero così chiaramente il tipo che finisce nei guai da non poter andare in giro con le occhiaie, o chiamare un dottore, o vomitare di tanto in tanto, senza che tutti saltassero immediatamente a una sola conclusione?

src: That's not bitterness about what happened or anything like it, more a professional belief in myself that it would have been better in the long run for me, Eithne Browne, and probably for Chrissie, too.
mt: No es amargura por lo que pasó o algo así, más bien una creencia profesional en mí mismo de que habría sido mejor para mí, Eithne Browne, y probablemente para Chrissie también.

src: The conglomerate, acting through its ‘ directing mind and will ’, does not deal in its own shares ; instead it uses information generated by its clients ( or, on occasion, information generated from within the conglomerate itself ) to make profits, or to limit its losses, by trading with the public, or even by giving advice to clients, at a time when it ( the conglomerate ) has access to unpublished price sensitive information pertaining to publicly traded securities.
mt: Il conglomerato, agendo attraverso la propria « mente e volontà direttive », non tratta le proprie azioni; invece, utilizza le informazioni generate dai propri clienti (o, in alcuni casi, le informazioni generate all'interno dello stesso conglomerato) per realizzare profitti o limitare le perdite, operando con il pubblico o addirittura dando consigli ai clienti, in un momento in cui esso (il conglomerato) ha accesso a informazioni non pubbliche sensibili in termini di prezzo relative a titoli negoziati pubblicamente.

src: Seems like he lost his temper, chief.
mt: Parece que perdió los estribos, jefe.

src: It came as the parents of 12-year-old victim Timothy Parry — critically ill in a Liverpool hospital — came to terms with the fact that he is unlikely to survive.
mt: Esto sucedió cuando los padres de la víctima de 12 años, Timothy Parry, que se encuentra gravemente enfermo en un hospital de Liverpool, se dieron cuenta de que es poco probable que sobreviva.

src: Peter said that although fifth was a respectable position he felt the team was capable of pushing for the top spot and added the society was eager for new members or younger people with innovative ideas.
mt: Peter dijo que, aunque la quinta posición era respetable, sentía que el equipo era capaz de luchar por el primer puesto y añadió que la sociedad estaba deseosa de tener nuevos miembros o personas más jóvenes con ideas innovadoras.

src: The back division have badly under-performed while the forwards have hardly made any mistakes, with debutant No 8, Michael Galwey, outstanding.
mt: La defensa ha tenido un rendimiento muy inferior al esperado, mientras que los delanteros apenas han cometido errores, y el debutante número 8, Michael Galwey, ha sido excepcional.

src: Gen Noriega ingratiated himself by offering his services to a White House bent on making the Sandinistas admit defeat, although his help for the contra cause was limited.
mt: El general Noriega se ganó los favores ofreciendo sus servicios a una Casa Blanca decidida a hacer que los sandinistas admitieran la derrota, aunque su ayuda a la causa de los contras fue limitada.

src: Reaching a compromise between conservation and access becomes ever more complex, both in the countryside and in historic houses and gardens.
mt: Il devient de plus en plus complexe de parvenir à un compromis entre conservation et accès, aussi bien dans la campagne que dans les maisons et les jardins historiques.

src: It annoys me, that's all.
mt: Me molesta, eso es todo.

src: Mine is one of those libraries which pays the bill…
mt: La mia è una di quelle biblioteche che paga il conto…

src: Another 95 were being axed in 51 schools, with a possible 90 further redundancies expected to follow.
mt: Otros 95 fueron despedidos en 51 escuelas, y se espera que haya otros 90 despidos.

src: Some would say that blame should begin, even end, with Rushdie himself : that this ‘ impertinent, whining guest, ’ as Lord Tebbit unforgivably called him, wrote a calculatedly provocative book, brought the predictable wrath of Islam down upon himself and has since presented the taxpayer with a multi-million pound bill for warding off due retribution.
mt: Alcuni direbbero che la colpa dovrebbe iniziare, e persino finire, con lo stesso Rushdie: che questo “ospite impertinente e lagnoso”, come lo ha definito in modo imperdonabile Lord Tebbit, ha scritto un libro calcolato per provocare, ha attirato su di sé l’ira prevedibile dell’Islam e da allora ha presentato al contribuente un conto di diversi milioni di sterline per scongiurare la dovuta punizione.

src: John's already beaten me to the announcement on the straw poll, erm that I was going to do, but suffice to say that we normally do that at these types of seminars and there's always a few people in the room who put their hands up and say they have got more than ten data sources in their organization.
mt: John ya me ha adelantado con el anuncio de la encuesta rápida, erm, que iba a hacer, pero basta con decir que normalmente lo hacemos en este tipo de seminarios y siempre hay algunas personas en la sala que levantan la mano y dicen que tienen más de diez fuentes de datos en su organización.

src: Their activity amazed and baffled even the sceptical Bernier : ‘ They tell any person his thoughts, cause the branch of a tree to blossom and to produce fruit within an hour, hatch an egg in their bosom within fifteen minutes, producing whatever bird may be demanded, and make it fly around the room.’
mt: Su actividad asombraba y desconcertaba incluso al escéptico Bernier: «Dicen a cualquier persona lo que piensa, hacen que la rama de un árbol florezca y produzca fruta en una hora, hacen que un huevo se desarrolle en su seno en quince minutos, produciendo cualquier pájaro que se solicite, y lo hacen volar por la habitación».

src: Are not those successful British companies fed up with being talked down by the doom-monger Labour party?
mt: ¿No están cansadas estas exitosas empresas británicas de que el Partido Laborista les diga que todo va a salir mal?

src: We have been to one town where many have closed down, and others are struggling to survive.
mt: Hemos estado en una ciudad donde muchos han cerrado y otros luchan por sobrevivir.

src: Regal Fox stole the spotlight.
mt: Regal Fox se robó el protagonismo.

src: On a week's package holiday at the time, the first break she had been able to afford since leaving drama school, it had taken her all of five minutes to decide to stay.
mt: En ese momento, estaba de vacaciones en un paquete de una semana, el primer descanso que había podido permitirse desde que dejó la escuela de teatro, y le había llevado cinco minutos decidirse a quedarse.

src: This is not the first time the issue of control has come up in this column but because yours is a sign that tends to resist adapting to circumstances, all too often you meet people and circumstances that appear to block your path.
mt: Non è la prima volta che in questa rubrica si affronta la questione del controllo, ma poiché il vostro è un segno che tende a resistere all'adattamento alle circostanze, troppo spesso incontrate persone e circostanze che sembrano bloccare il vostro cammino.

src: It is alarming that families with children who accept a social fund loan have to manage financially on 85 per cent of their normal income support entitlement.
mt: Es alarmante que las familias con hijos que aceptan un préstamo del fondo social deban arreglárselas con el 85% de su derecho a una ayuda económica normal.

src: Whereas in the wild, the effect of a burst of adrenaline would be worked off by the strenuous exercise (intense physical activity to escape a threat) that followed, this does not happen when the adrenaline is generated by an unpleasant encounter with a bank manager or traffic warden.
mt: Mentre in natura, l'effetto di un'ondata di adrenalina sarebbe dissipato dall'esercizio fisico intenso (attività fisica intensa per sfuggire a una minaccia) che ne segue, questo non accade quando l'adrenalina è generata da un incontro spiacevole con un manager di banca o un vigile urbano.

src: Council to cause a stir at the show.
mt: El Consejo causará un gran revuelo en la exhibición.

src: Buying a horse with clean x-ray plates a) avoids buying trouble, and b) if the horse does not perform satisfactorily, and you need to sell, there is less chance of running into problems during the next purchaser's vetting.

src: It is not without significance, of course, that a young man of good Dissenting stock, with impoverished uncles, aunts and cousins, should nevertheless have chosen to openly declare his support in a fight against a nation which, for all its extremes, represented some form of democratic republicanism.
mt: Non è senza significato, naturalmente, che un giovane uomo di buona discendenza dissente, con zii, zie e cugini impoveriti, abbia comunque scelto di dichiarare apertamente il suo sostegno in una lotta contro una nazione che, nonostante i suoi estremi, rappresentava una forma di repubblicanesimo democratico.

src: Prince Rupert managed to fight his way towards London and having reached Brentford, he decided to try to capture London and whilst his troops were encamped on Kew Green, they learned from a maid from a riverside inn ( The Bull ) that Oliver Cromwell was holding a council of war there, so he despatched some horsemen to capture Cromwell, but the ‘ Round Heads ’ repelled the horsemen until Cromwell had escaped in a boat to the island in the river closeby, which island has been called ‘ Oliver Isle ’ ever since.
mt: El príncipe Rupert logró abrirse paso hacia Londres y, tras llegar a Brentford, decidió intentar capturar Londres y, mientras sus tropas acampaban en Kew Green, se enteraron por una sirvienta de una posada junto al río (The Bull) que Oliver Cromwell estaba celebrando un consejo de guerra allí, por lo que envió a algunos jinetes para capturar a Cromwell, pero los "cabezones" repelieron a los jinetes hasta que Cromwell escapó en un bote a la isla del río cercano, que se ha llamado "Isla de Oliver" desde entonces.

src: But he had the backing of what the chronicler calls the'more foresighted'part of the council, and this tacit approval suggests that the argument was not simply that of an'anti - Woodville' faction, but represented a genuine attempt to avoid causing unrest or destabilization — an attitude in line with what is known of council policy.
mt: Ma lui aveva il sostegno di quella che il cronista definisce la parte "più lungimirante" del consiglio, e questo tacito consenso suggerisce che l'argomento non era semplicemente quello di una fazione "anti-Woodville", ma rappresentava un genuino tentativo di evitare di causare disordini o destabilizzazione, un atteggiamento in linea con quanto è noto della politica del consiglio.

src: We then went a stage further and to share the technology established joint teams for each of these major areas, so that er the specification while it was under Dasa's leadership, it was actually done by a joint team which involved expertise from British Aerospace and the other three and er therefore at that time the whole Eurofighter consortium was confident that they were making the best use of the available expertise across the four partner companies, each contributing their expertise, so that they could go forward on a confident basis.
mt: Siamo poi andati oltre e, per condividere la tecnologia, abbiamo costituito team congiunti per ciascuna di queste aree principali, in modo che la specifica, pur essendo sotto la direzione di Dasa, fosse effettivamente realizzata da un team congiunto che coinvolgesse le competenze di British Aerospace e delle altre tre società e, quindi, in quel momento l'intero consorzio Eurofighter era fiducioso di poter sfruttare al meglio le competenze disponibili nelle quattro società partner, ognuna delle quali contribuiva con le proprie competenze, in modo da poter andare avanti con fiducia.
